SPIR-V Shader - Polka Dots

View SPIR-V (5091 chars)
; SPIR-V
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; --- Types ---
%void_type = OpTypeVoid
%bool_type = OpTypeBool
%int_type = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float_type = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec2_type = OpTypeVector %float_type 2
%vec3_type = OpTypeVector %float_type 3
%vec4_type = OpTypeVector %float_type 4
%mat4_type = OpTypeMatrix %float_type 4

; --- Constants ---
%const_0_0 = OpConstant %float_type 0.0
%const_1_0 = OpConstant %float_type 1.0
%const_0_1 = OpConstant %float_type 0.1
%const_0_3 = OpConstant %float_type 0.3
%const_0_5 = OpConstant %float_type 0.5
%const_0_7 = OpConstant %float_type 0.7
%const_0_8 = OpConstant %float_type 0.8
%const_6_float = OpConstant %float_type 6.0
%const_0_int = OpConstant %int_type 0
%const_1_int = OpConstant %int_type 1
%const_2_int = OpConstant %int_type 2
%const_3_int = OpConstant %int_type 3
%const_4_int = OpConstant %int_type 4

; --- Input Variables ---
%worldPos_var = OpVariable %Input %vec3_type
OpDecorate %worldPos_var Location 0
%normal_var = OpVariable %Input %vec3_type
OpDecorate %normal_var Location 1
%uv_var = OpVariable %Input %vec2_type
OpDecorate %uv_var Location 2
%tangent_var = OpVariable %Input %vec3_type
OpDecorate %tangent_var Location 3
%color_var = OpVariable %Input %vec3_type
OpDecorate %color_var Location 4

; --- Uniform Buffer ---
%ubo_struct_members = OpTypeStruct %mat4_type %mat4_type %mat4_type %vec4_type %vec4_type %vec4_type
%ubo_var = OpVariable Uniform %ubo_struct_members
OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

; --- Output Variable ---
%outColor_var = OpVariable %Output %vec4_type
OpDecorate %outColor_var Location 0

; --- Main Function ---
%main_func = OpFunction %void_type
    ; Load Input variables
    %worldPos_val = OpLoad %vec3_type %worldPos_var
    %normal_val = OpLoad %vec3_type %normal_var
    %uv_val = OpLoad %vec2_type %uv_var
    %tangent_val = OpLoad %vec3_type %tangent_var
    %color_val = OpLoad %vec3_type %color_var

    ; Access UBO members
    %lightPos_val = OpLoad %vec4_type OpAccessChain %ubo_var %const_3_int ; lightPos (offset 192)
    %cameraPos_val = OpLoad %vec4_type OpAccessChain %ubo_var %const_4_int ; cameraPos (offset 208)

    ; --- Polka Dot Logic ---
    ; uv_times_6 = uv * 6.0
    %uv_times_6 = OpFMul %vec2_type %uv_val (%const_6_float, %const_6_float)

    ; cell_idx_float = floor(uv * 6.0)
    %cell_idx_float = OpFloor %vec2_type %uv_times_6

    ; cell_uv_relative = (uv * 6.0) - floor(uv * 6.0)
    %cell_uv_relative = OpFSub %vec2_type %uv_times_6 %cell_idx_float

    ; Distance from cell center (0.5, 0.5)
    %cell_center = OpCompositeConstruct %vec2_type %const_0_5 %const_0_5
    %diff_from_center = OpFSub %vec2_type %cell_uv_relative %cell_center
    %dist_sq = OpDot %float_type %diff_from_center %diff_from_center
    %dist = OpSqrt %float_type %dist_sq
    %is_dot = OpFOrdLessThan %bool_type %dist %const_0_3

    ; Base Colors (Yellow and Dark Blue)
    %dot_color = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4_type %const_1_0 %const_0_8 %const_0_0 %const_1_0 ; Yellow RGBA
    %bg_color = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4_type %const_0_1 %const_0_1 %const_0_3 %const_1_0 ; Dark Blue RGBA

    ; Select base color based on whether it's a dot
    %base_color = OpSelect %vec4_type %dot_color %bg_color %is_dot

    ; --- Lambertian Shading ---
    ; Calculate light direction vector: lightPos.xyz - cameraPos.xyz
    %lightPos_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %vec3_type %lightPos_val 0
    %cameraPos_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %vec3_type %cameraPos_val 0
    %light_dir_vec = OpFSub %vec3_type %lightPos_xyz %cameraPos_xyz
    ; Normalize the light direction
    %light_dir_norm = OpNormalize %vec3_type %light_dir_vec

    ; Normalize the surface normal
    %normal_norm = OpNormalize %vec3_type %normal_val
    ; Calculate diffuse term: dot(normal_norm, light_dir_norm)
    %diffuse = OpDot %float_type %normal_norm %light_dir_norm

    ; Clamp diffuse to the range [0, 1]
    %diffuse_pos = OpMax %float_type %diffuse %const_0_0
    %diffuse_clamped = OpMin %float_type %diffuse_pos %const_1_0

    ; Calculate shading factor: 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse_clamped
    %shading_factor_term1 = OpFMul %float_type %const_0_7 %diffuse_clamped
    %shading_factor = OpFAdd %float_type %const_0_3 %shading_factor_term1

    ; Apply shading to the base color
    ; Extend shading_factor to a vec4 for element-wise multiplication
    %shading_factor_vec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4_type %shading_factor %shading_factor %shading_factor %shading_factor
    %final_color = OpFMul %vec4_type %base_color %shading_factor_vec4

    ; Store the final computed color into the output variable
    OpStore %outColor_var %final_color

    OpReturn
OpEndFunction

; --- Entry Point Declaration ---
; Declares the 'main' function as the entry point for the fragment shader,
; linking the global input and output variables.
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main_func "main" %worldPos_var %normal_var %uv_var %tangent_var %color_var %outColor_var
; Specifies the origin for fragment processing (OriginUpperLeft is common for Vulkan).
OpExecutionMode %main_func OriginUpperLeft

SPIR-V Shader - Hemisphere Lighting

Approach: Here is the SPIR-V assembly code for the fragment shader:

View SPIR-V (5378 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini CLI;
; Generator Tools: spirv-as
; Target: Vulkan 1.0

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; --- Types ---
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4float = OpTypeMatrix %float 4 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32

; --- GLSL.std.450 Extension ---
%glsl_std_450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; --- Constants ---
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_15 = OpConstant %float 0.15
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6

%v3_000 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0
%v3_010 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_1_0 %float_0 ; Hemisphere axis (0, 1, 0)
%v4_skycolor = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_4 %float_0_6 %float_1_0 %float_1_0 ; Sky color R,G,B,A (using 1.0 for A)
%v4_groundcolor = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_3 %float_0_15 %float_0_05 %float_1_0 ; Ground color R,G,B,A (using 1.0 for A)

; --- UBO Structure ---
%ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4float %mat4float %mat4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ubo_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_struct
%ubo_var = OpVariable %ubo_ptr Uniform

; --- Input Variables ---
%worldPos_in = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%worldPos = OpVariable %worldPos_in Input
%normal_in = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%normal = OpVariable %normal_in Input
%uv_in = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%uv = OpVariable %uv_in Input
%tangent_in = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%tangent = OpVariable %tangent_in Input
%color_in = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%color = OpVariable %color_in Input

; --- Output Variable ---
%outColor_out = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%outColor = OpVariable %outColor_out Output

; --- Function: main ---
%main = OpFunction %void None %void
    OpLabel
    ; Load inputs
    %worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
    %normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal
    %uv_val = OpLoad %v2float %uv
    %tangent_val = OpLoad %v3float %tangent
    %color_val = OpLoad %v3float %color

    ; --- Normalize normal ---
    %n_normalized = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %normal_val

    ; --- Hemisphere Ambient Lighting ---
    ; Blend factor: n.y * 0.5 + 0.5
    %dot_n_y = OpDot %float %n_normalized %v3_010 ; Dot product with (0,1,0) gives n.y
    %blend_step1 = OpFMul %float %dot_n_y %float_0_5
    %blend = OpFAdd %float %blend_step1 %float_0_5

    ; Mix sky and ground colors using GLSL.std.450.Mix
    %ambient_rgb = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Mix %v4_groundcolor %v4_skycolor %blend

    ; --- Small Diffuse Term ---
    ; Load UBO params and extract params.y
    %ubo_params_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr Uniform %ubo_var %int_5 ; Index 5 for params
    %ubo_params_val = OpLoad %v4float %ubo_params_ptr
    %params_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %ubo_params_val 1 ; Extract y component

    ; Calculate diffuse term: 0.3 * params.y
    %diffuse_term_scalar = OpFMul %float %float_0_3 %params_y

    ; Broadcast diffuse term scalar to vec3 for addition
    %diffuse_term_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %diffuse_term_scalar %diffuse_term_scalar %diffuse_term_scalar

    ; --- Combine Ambient and Diffuse ---
    %final_rgb = OpFAdd %v3float %ambient_rgb %diffuse_term_vec

    ; --- Set Alpha ---
    %final_rgba = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb %float_1_0 ; Set alpha to 1.0

    ; --- Store Output ---
    OpStore %outColor %final_rgba

    OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; --- Decorations ---
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %tangent "tangent"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %ubo_var "UBO"
OpName %ubo_struct "UBO_struct"

OpDecorate %worldPos Input
OpDecorate %normal Input
OpDecorate %uv Input
OpDecorate %tangent Input
OpDecorate %color Input
OpDecorate %outColor Output
OpDecorate %ubo_var Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo_struct Block

; Member decorations for UBO structure (offsets and strides)
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct %int_5 Offset 224

; Location decorations for input/output variables
OpDecorate %worldPos (Location %int_0)
OpDecorate %normal (Location %int_1)
OpDecorate %uv (Location %int_2)
OpDecorate %tangent (Location %int_3)
OpDecorate %color (Location %int_4)
OpDecorate %outColor (Location %int_0)

; Descriptor set and binding for UBO
OpDecorate %ubo_var (DescriptorSet %int_0)
OpDecorate %ubo_var (Binding %int_0)

; --- Entry Point ---
; Ensure all variables used in the function are listed here.
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; --- Indices for UBO members and decorations ---
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5

View SPIR-V (2854 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Unknown
; Target: Vulkan 1.0

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Entry point
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Input/Output variables
OpDecorate %worldPos Input
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Input
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Input
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Input
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Input
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Uniform buffer
OpDecorate %ubo Block
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %uboUniform Buffer
OpDecorate %uboUniform Offset 0
OpDecorate %uboUniform MatrixStride 16
OpDecorate %uboUniform ColMajor

OpMemberDecorate %ubo 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %ubo 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %ubo 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %ubo 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %ubo 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %ubo 5 Offset 224

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%f32 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%f0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%f0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%f0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%f1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

%mat4x4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%ubo = OpTypeStruct %mat4x4float %mat4x4float %mat4x4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%uniformConstant = OpTypeQualifier %ubo Uniform
%uniformConstantSampler = OpTypeImage %ubo %void %void %void %void %void %void %void %void %void

%ptrUniform = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo
%ptrOutput = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; Variables
%ubo = OpVariable %ptrUniform Uniform

%worldPos = OpVariable Input %v3float
%normal = OpVariable Input %v3float
%uv = OpVariable Input %v2float
%tangent = OpVariable Input %v3float
%color = OpVariable Input %v4float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptrOutput

; Entry point function
%main = OpFunction %void None %easingFunction

; Function body
    %temp_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
    %worldPosY = OpCompositeExtract %float %temp_worldPos 1

    ; t = clamp(worldPos.y * 0.5 + 0.5)
    %mult_y = OpFMul %float %worldPosY %f0_5
    %add_y = OpFAdd %float %mult_y %f0_5
    %t = OpClamp %float %add_y %f0_0 %f1_0

    ; bottom color (0.1, 0.4, 0.1)
    %bottomColor = OpConstantComposite %v3float %f0_1 %f0_4 %f0_1

    ; top color (1.0, 1.0, 1.0)
    %topColor = OpConstantComposite %v3float %f1_0 %f1_0 %f1_0

    ; mix bottom to top based on t
    %mixedColor = OpBlendVBlendV %v3float %t %bottomColor %topColor

    ; output alpha 1.0
    %finalColor = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mixedColor %f1_0

    ; Store output
    OpStore %outColor %finalColor

    OpReturn
%easingFunction = OpTypeFunction %void
%f0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%f1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

SPIR-V Shader - Fog Effect

Approach: Here is the complete SPIR-V assembly text for the fragment shader, implementing distance-based fog and Lambertian lighting:

View SPIR-V (6104 chars)
; SPIR-V
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; --- Types ---
OpTypeVoid
OpTypeBool
OpTypeFloat 32
OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 2
OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3
OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 4
OpTypeArray (OpTypeFloat 32) 4 ; vec4 array for mat4
OpTypeArray (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 4) 4 ; Correct type for mat4 as array of 4 vec4s
OpTypeStruct ; UBO struct type
    %mat4_type = OpTypeArray (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 4) 4 ; vec4[4] for mat4
    %ubo_type = OpTypeStruct
        %mat4_type ; model, offset 0
        %mat4_type ; view, offset 64
        %mat4_type ; projection, offset 128
        %v4float   ; lightPos, offset 192
        %v4float   ; cameraPos, offset 208
        %v4float   ; params, offset 224

; Pointers to types
%v4float_ptr = OpTypePointer Function (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 4)
%v3float_ptr = OpTypePointer Function (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3)
%v2float_ptr = OpTypePointer Function (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 2)
%float_ptr = OpTypePointer Function (OpTypeFloat 32)
%bool_ptr = OpTypePointer Function (OpTypeBool)

; Input variables
%worldPos_ptr = OpTypePointer Input (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3)
%normal_ptr = OpTypePointer Input (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3)
%uv_ptr = OpTypePointer Input (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 2)
%tangent_ptr = OpTypePointer Input (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3)
%color_ptr = OpTypePointer Input (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3)

; Output variable
%outColor_ptr = OpTypePointer Output (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 4)

; Uniform buffer pointer
%ubo_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_type

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_1_5 = OpConstant %float 1.5
%float_3 = OpConstant %float 3.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_0_7_fog = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_8_fog = OpConstant %float 0.8
%v3_base_color_rgb = OpConstantComposite (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3) %float_0_8 %float_0_2 %float_0_2
%v3_fog_color_rgb = OpConstantComposite (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 3) %float_0_7_fog %float_0_7_fog %float_0_8_fog
%v4_one = OpConstantComposite (OpTypeVector (OpTypeFloat 32) 4) %float_1 %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

; Variables for inputs and outputs
%worldPos = OpVariable Input %worldPos_ptr
%normal = OpVariable Input %normal_ptr
%uv = OpVariable Input %uv_ptr
%tangent = OpVariable Input %tangent_ptr
%color = OpVariable Input %color_ptr
%outColor = OpVariable Output %outColor_ptr

; Uniform buffer instantiation
%uniform_buffer = OpVariable Uniform %ubo_ptr

; --- Main function ---
%main = OpFunction %void None %void
%label_main_entry = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%loaded_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%loaded_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal
; %loaded_color = OpLoad %v3float %color ; Color input is not used in the final calculation per task description

; Load UBO
%ubo_data = OpLoad %ubo_type %uniform_buffer

; Extract cameraPos and lightPos from UBO
; lightPos is at struct index 3, cameraPos is at struct index 4
%lightPos_vec4 = OpCompositeExtract %v4float %ubo_data 3
%cameraPos_vec4 = OpCompositeExtract %v4float %ubo_data 4

; Extract XYZ from cameraPos and lightPos vec4
%lightPos = OpVectorExtractDynamic %v3float %lightPos_vec4 (OpConstant %float 0)
%cameraPos = OpVectorExtractDynamic %v3float %cameraPos_vec4 (OpConstant %float 0)

; --- Diffuse Calculation ---
; Calculate light direction vector
%light_dir_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos %loaded_worldPos

; Manual normalization of light direction
%light_dir_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %light_dir_unnormalized 0
%light_dir_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %light_dir_unnormalized 1
%light_dir_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %light_dir_unnormalized 2

%light_dir_x_sq = OpFMul %float %light_dir_x %light_dir_x
%light_dir_y_sq = OpFMul %float %light_dir_y %light_dir_y
%light_dir_z_sq = OpFMul %float %light_dir_z %light_dir_z

%light_dir_len_sq = OpFAdd %float %light_dir_x_sq (OpFAdd %float %light_dir_y_sq %light_dir_z_sq)
%light_dir_len = OpSqrt %float %light_dir_len_sq

; Safe normalization to avoid division by zero
%safe_inv_len = OpSelect %float %float_0 %float_1 (OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %light_dir_len %float_0)
%inv_light_dir_len = OpFDiv %float %float_1 %safe_inv_len

%normalized_light_dir_x = OpFMul %float %light_dir_x %inv_light_dir_len
%normalized_light_dir_y = OpFMul %float %light_dir_y %inv_light_dir_len
%normalized_light_dir_z = OpFMul %float %light_dir_z %inv_light_dir_len
%normalized_light_dir = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %normalized_light_dir_x %normalized_light_dir_y %normalized_light_dir_z

; Calculate diffuse term
%diffuse = OpDot %float %loaded_normal %normalized_light_dir

; Clamp diffuse to [0, 1]
%clamped_diffuse_val = OpFClamp %float %diffuse %float_0 %float_1

; Calculate Lambertian factor: 0.3 + 0.7 * clamped_diffuse
%lambertian_factor_term1 = OpFMul %float %clamped_diffuse_val %float_0_7
%lambertian_factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_3 %lambertian_factor_term1

; Base RGB color calculation: lambertian_factor * (0.8, 0.2, 0.2)
%base_color_rgb_mul = OpFMul %v3float %lambertian_factor %v3_base_color_rgb

; --- Distance-based Fog ---
; Calculate distance from cameraPos to worldPos
%dist_vec = OpFSub %v3float %loaded_worldPos %cameraPos
%dist_sq = OpDot %float %dist_vec %dist_vec
%dist = OpSqrt %float %dist_sq

; Calculate fog factor: clamp((dist - 1.5) / 3.0)
%dist_minus_1_5 = OpFSub %float %dist %float_1_5
%fog_factor_unclamped = OpFDiv %float %dist_minus_1_5 %float_3
%fog_factor = OpFClamp %float %fog_factor_unclamped %float_0 %float_1

; --- Mix colors ---
; outColor.rgb = mix(base_color_rgb, fog_color, fog_factor)
%mixed_rgb = OpVectorMix %v3float %base_color_rgb_mul %v3_fog_color_rgb %fog_factor

; Set output color (alpha = 1.0)
%outColor_final = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mixed_rgb %float_1

; Store output
OpStore %outColor %outColor_final

OpReturn
OpEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Gooch Shading

View SPIR-V (3382 chars)
; SPIR-V
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Entry point and execution mode
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %worldPos %normal %ubo
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4
%ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4
%ubo_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_struct
%float_ptr_in = OpTypePointer Input %float
%vec3_ptr_in = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%vec4_ptr_in = OpTypePointer Input %vec4
%vec4_ptr_out = OpTypePointer Output %vec4

; Constants
%int = OpTypeInt 32
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3 ; index for lightPos in UBO
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5 ; index for params in UBO

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

%vec3_coolColor = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %float_0_2 %float_0_2 %float_0_75
%vec3_warmColor = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_4
%vec3_one = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0
%vec4_one_alpha = OpConstantComposite %vec4 %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0 ; For output alpha

; GLSL built-in extension
%glsl_module = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Global variables (Inputs and Outputs)
%outColor = OpVariable Output %vec4_ptr_out
%worldPos = OpVariable Input %vec3_ptr_in
%normal = OpVariable Input %vec3_ptr_in
%ubo = OpVariable Uniform %ubo_ptr

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void "main"
  %label_entry = OpLabel

  ; Load inputs
  %worldPos_val = OpLoad %vec3 %worldPos
  %normal_val = OpLoad %vec3 %normal

  ; Load UBO members
  %lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %vec4_ptr_in %ubo %int_3
  %lightPos_val = OpLoad %vec4 %lightPos_ptr
  %params_ptr = OpAccessChain %vec4_ptr_in %ubo %int_5
  %params_val = OpLoad %vec4 %params_ptr

  ; Normalize normal
  %normalized_normal = OpExtInst %vec3 %glsl_module OpNormalize %normal_val

  ; Calculate light direction (L)
  %lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %lightPos_val %lightPos_val %int_0 %int_1 %int_2 ; Extract xyz from lightPos
  %lightDir = OpVector opSub %vec3 %lightPos_xyz %worldPos_val
  %normalized_lightDir = OpExtInst %vec3 %glsl_module OpNormalize %lightDir

  ; Calculate NdotL
  %NdotL = OpDot %float %normalized_normal %normalized_lightDir

  ; Calculate t = dot(N,L) * 0.5 + 0.5
  %t_term1 = OpFMul %float %NdotL %float_0_5
  %t = OpFAdd %float %t_term1 %float_0_5

  ; Calculate diffuse color: coolColor * (1.0 - t) + warmColor * t
  %one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %t
  %cool_contrib = OpFMul %vec3 %vec3_coolColor %one_minus_t
  %warm_contrib = OpFMul %vec3 %vec3_warmColor %t
  %diffuse_color = OpFAdd %vec3 %cool_contrib %warm_contrib

  ; Calculate ambient term: ambientLight * params.y
  %ambientLight = %vec3_one ; Assuming white ambient light
  %Ka = OpCompositeExtract %float %params_val %int_1 ; Extract y component of params
  %ambient_term = OpFMul %vec3 %ambientLight %Ka

  ; Combine ambient and diffuse
  %final_rgb = OpFAdd %vec3 %ambient_term %diffuse_color

  ; Construct output color (RGBA) with alpha = 1.0
  %outColor_val = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %final_rgb %float_1_0
  OpStore %outColor %outColor_val

  OpReturn
  OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Brick Pattern

View SPIR-V (6666 chars)
; SPIR-V,1.0
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; --- Types ---
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4float = OpTypeMatrix %float 4 4
%bool = OpTypeBool

; --- UBO struct definition ---
; Members: mat4 model, mat4 view, mat4 projection, vec4 lightPos, vec4 cameraPos, vec4 params
%ubo_members = OpTypeStruct %mat4float %mat4float %mat4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ubo_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_members

; --- Function types ---
%func_void = OpTypeFunction %void
%func_ubo_ptr = OpTypeFunction %ubo_ptr
%func_float = OpTypeFunction %float
%func_v3float_v4float_v4float_v3float = OpTypeFunction %float %v3float %v4float %v4float %v3float ; For calculate_diffuse
%func_v2float_float_float_float_float_v3float_v3float = OpTypeFunction %v3float %v2float %float %float %float %float %v3float %v3float ; For generate_brick_pattern

; --- Global Declarations ---

; Input variables from vertex shader
%worldPos_var = OpVariable %v3float Input
OpDecorate %worldPos_var Location 0

%normal_var = OpVariable %v3float Input
OpDecorate %normal_var Location 1

%uv_var = OpVariable %v2float Input
OpDecorate %uv_var Location 2

%tangent_var = OpVariable %v3float Input
OpDecorate %tangent_var Location 3

%color_var = OpVariable %v4float Input
OpDecorate %color_var Location 4

; Output variable
%outColor = OpVariable %v4float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Uniform buffer
%UBO = OpVariable %ubo_ptr Uniform
OpDecorate %UBO DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO Binding 0

; --- Constants ---
%const_8 = OpConstant %float 8.0
%const_16 = OpConstant %float 16.0
%const_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%const_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%const_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%const_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%const_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%const_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%const_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%const_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%const_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%const_2_0 = OpConstant %float 2.0

; --- Function to get UBO Data ---
%get_ubo_data = OpFunction %ubo_ptr None %func_ubo_ptr
    %ubo_load = OpLoad %ubo_ptr %UBO
    OpReturnValue %ubo_load
OpFunctionEnd

; --- Function to calculate diffuse lighting ---
%calculate_diffuse = OpFunction %float None %func_v3float_v4float_v4float_v3float
    %norm_param = OpFunctionParameter %v3float
    %lightPos_param = OpFunctionParameter %v4float
    %camPos_param = OpFunctionParameter %v4float ; Not used in this Lambertian calculation
    %worldPos_param = OpFunctionParameter %v3float

    ; Calculate light direction: lightPos - worldPos
    %lightDir_raw = OpVectorSubtract %v3float %lightPos_param %worldPos_param
    %lightDir_normalized = OpFNormalize %v3float %lightDir_raw

    ; Calculate dot product for diffuse
    %diffuse = OpDot %float %norm_param %lightDir_normalized

    ; Clamp diffuse factor to [0, 1]
    %clamped_diffuse = OpFClamp %float %diffuse %const_0_0 %const_1_0

    OpReturnValue %clamped_diffuse
OpFunctionEnd

; --- Function to generate brick pattern ---
%generate_brick_pattern = OpFunction %v3float None %func_v2float_float_float_float_float_v3float_v3float
    %uv_param = OpFunctionParameter %v2float
    %scale_x_param = OpFunctionParameter %float
    %scale_y_param = OpFunctionParameter %float
    %mortar_thick_x_param = OpFunctionParameter %float
    %mortar_thick_y_param = OpFunctionParameter %float
    %mortar_color_param = OpFunctionParameter %v3float
    %brick_color_param = OpFunctionParameter %v3float

    ; Scale UVs
    %scaled_uv_x = OpFMul %float %uv_param.x %scale_x_param
    %scaled_uv_y = OpFMul %float %uv_param.y %scale_y_param
    %scaled_uv = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %scaled_uv_x %scaled_uv_y

    ; Row staggering calculation
    %row_index_y_float = OpFloor %float %scaled_uv.y
    %row_mod_2 = OpMod %float %row_index_y_float %const_2_0
    ; Check if row_mod_2 is close to 0.0 (for even rows)
    %is_even_row = OpQuantizeToScalar %bool %row_mod_2 %const_0_0 

    %offset_x = OpSelect %float %is_even_row %const_0_0 %const_0_5 ; Half-brick offset for odd rows

    ; Calculate coordinates within a single brick/mortar cell
    %cell_x = OpFract %float %scaled_uv.x
    %cell_y = OpFract %float %scaled_uv.y

    ; Apply offset to x coordinate
    %offset_cell_x = OpFAdd %float %cell_x %offset_x

    ; Check if inside mortar
    %in_mortar_x = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %offset_cell_x %mortar_thick_x_param
    %in_mortar_x2 = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %offset_cell_x (OpFSub %float %const_1_0 %mortar_thick_x_param)
    %in_mortar_y = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %cell_y %mortar_thick_y_param
    %in_mortar_y2 = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %cell_y (OpFSub %float %const_1_0 %mortar_thick_y_param)

    %is_in_mortar = OpLogicalOr %bool %in_mortar_x %in_mortar_x2
    %is_in_mortar = OpLogicalOr %bool %is_in_mortar %in_mortar_y
    %is_in_mortar = OpLogicalOr %bool %is_in_mortar %in_mortar_y2

    %result_color = OpSelect %v3float %is_in_mortar %mortar_color_param %brick_color_param

    OpReturnValue %result_color
OpFunctionEnd

; --- Main Entry Point ---
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_void
    ; Load inputs
    %worldPos_load = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos_var
    %normal_load = OpLoad %v3float %normal_var
    %uv_load = OpLoad %v2float %uv_var
    %color_load = OpLoad %v4float %color_var ; Not used in this shader but declared

    ; Get UBO data and required components
    %ubo_ptr_main = OpFunctionCall %ubo_ptr %get_ubo_data
    %lightPos_main_val = OpLoad %v4float (OpAccessChain %v4float %ubo_ptr_main 3 0) ; Load lightPos
    %camPos_main_val = OpLoad %v4float (OpAccessChain %v4float %ubo_ptr_main 4 0) ; Load cameraPos

    ; Calculate diffuse lighting
    %diffuse_factor = OpFunctionCall %float %calculate_diffuse %normal_load %lightPos_main_val %camPos_main_val %worldPos_load

    ; Calculate brick color using the pattern function
    %brick_color_result = OpFunctionCall %v3float %generate_brick_pattern %uv_load %const_8 %const_16 %const_0_05 %const_0_1 %const_0_7 %const_0_2

    ; Apply Lambertian shading: (0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse)
    %diffuse_term = OpFMul %float %diffuse_factor %const_0_6
    %shading_factor = OpFAdd %float %diffuse_term %const_0_4

    ; Multiply brick color by shading factor
    %final_color_rgb = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %brick_color_result %shading_factor

    ; Set output color (alpha = 1.0)
    %final_color_rgba = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_color_rgb.x %final_color_rgb.y %final_color_rgb.z %const_1_0
    OpStore %outColor %final_color_rgba

    OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; --- Execution Modes ---
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

SPIR-V Shader - Fresnel Heatmap

View SPIR-V (3820 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: GLSLangValidator; 10
; Target: Vulkan 1.0
OpExtension "SPV_GOOGLE_hlsl_extensions"
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4float %mat4float %mat4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_struct
%ptr_input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2.0

; Uniform buffer
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform
    OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
    OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Input/Output variables
%worldPos_var = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input
    OpDecorate %worldPos_var Location 0
%normal_var = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input
    OpDecorate %normal_var Location 1
%uv_var = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input ; Prompt lists vec2 but shows location 2 and implies vec3. Using vec3 as per prompt.
    OpDecorate %uv_var Location 2
%tangent_var = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input
    OpDecorate %tangent_var Location 3
%color_var = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input
    OpDecorate %color_var Location 4
%outColor_var = OpVariable %ptr_output_v4 Output
    OpDecorate %outColor_var Location 0

; Entry point function
%main = OpFunction %void %func_void_main
    %label_entry = OpLabel

    ; Load UBO and camera position
    %ubo_val = OpLoad %ubo_struct %ubo
    %cameraPos = OpCompositeExtract %v4float %ubo_val 4 ; Offset 4 for cameraPos

    ; Load input variables that are actually used
    %worldPos_in = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos_var
    %normal_in = OpLoad %v3float %normal_var

    ; Calculate view direction V
    ; Cast worldPos_in (vec3) to vec4 with w=1.0 for subtraction with cameraPos (vec4)
    %worldPos_in_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %worldPos_in %float_1
    %view_vec_4 = OpVectorSubtract %v4float %cameraPos %worldPos_in_v4
    ; Normalize the xyz components, discarding w. Result is vec3.
    %view_dir = OpNormalize %v3float %view_vec_4

    ; Calculate NdotV = max(dot(N, V), 0.0)
    %dot_nv = OpDot %float %normal_in %view_dir
    %ndotv = OpMax %float %dot_nv %float_0

    ; Conditional logic for color based on NdotV
    ; cond_lt_0_5 is true if NdotV < 0.5
    %cond_lt_0_5 = OpFOrdLessThan %float %ndotv %float_0_5

    ; Calculate components for the 'else' branch (NdotV >= 0.5)
    ; factor = (NdotV - 0.5) * 2.0
    %ndotv_minus_0_5 = OpFSub %float %ndotv %float_0_5
    %two_times_factor = OpFMul %float %ndotv_minus_0_5 %float_2
    ; 1.0 - factor
    %one_minus_two_times_factor = OpFSub %float %float_1 %two_times_factor

    ; Select components based on the condition
    ; r = OpSelect (cond ? 1.0 : 1.0 - factor)
    %r_val = OpSelect %float %cond_lt_0_5 %float_1 %one_minus_two_times_factor
    ; g = OpSelect (cond ? 2.0 * NdotV : 1.0 - factor)
    %factor_lt_0_5_g = OpFMul %float %ndotv %float_2 ; 2.0 * NdotV
    %g_val = OpSelect %float %cond_lt_0_5 %factor_lt_0_5_g %one_minus_two_times_factor
    ; b = OpSelect (cond ? 0.0 : factor)
    %b_val = OpSelect %float %cond_lt_0_5 %float_0 %two_times_factor

    ; Construct the final output color with alpha = 1.0
    %outColor_val = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %r_val %g_val %b_val %float_1

    ; Store the computed color to the output variable
    OpStore %outColor_var %outColor_val

    OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Entry point declaration: lists all input and output variables used by the main function
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos_var %normal_var %uv_var %tangent_var %color_var %outColor_var
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Unknown
; Target: Vulkan 1.0
; VUID-StandaloneSpirv-SPIRV-0001: SPIR-V module must start with version header.
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %worldPos %normal %color %lightPos %cameraPos %params
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Input variables
%worldPos = OpVariable Input %_ptr_Input_v3f32
%normal = OpVariable Input %_ptr_Input_v3f32
%color = OpVariable Input %_ptr_Input_v3f32

; Output variable
%outColor = OpVariable Output %_ptr_Output_v4f32

; Uniform buffer
%ubo_type = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4f %mat4v4f %mat4v4f %v4f %v4f %v4f
%ubo = OpTypeUniformConstant %ubo_type
%ub_handle = OpConstantNull %ubo

%lightPos = OpVariable Uniform %_ptr_Uniform_v4f32
%cameraPos = OpVariable Uniform %_ptr_Uniform_v4f32
%params = OpVariable Uniform %_ptr_Uniform_v4f32

; Constants
%f0 = OpConstant %f32 0.0
%f1 = OpConstant %f32 1.0
%f0_1 = OpConstant %f32 0.1
%f0_05 = OpConstant %f32 0.05
%f32_32 = OpConstant %f32 32.0

; Types
%v2f = OpTypeVector %f32 2
%v3f = OpTypeVector %f32 3
%v4f = OpTypeVector %f32 4
%f32 = OpTypeFloat 32
%mat4v4f = OpTypeMatrix %v4f 4
%ptr_v3f32 = OpTypePointer Input %v3f
%ptr_v4f32 = OpTypePointer Input %v4f
%ptr_f32 = OpTypePointer Function %f32
%ptr_v4f = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4f

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %v_void
%label_entry = OpLabel
%local_outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4f32 Function
OpStore %local_outColor %_ptr_Output_v4f32 ; Initialize with default or zero

; Load inputs
%loaded_worldPos = OpLoad %v3f %worldPos
%loaded_normal = OpLoad %v3f %normal
%loaded_color = OpLoad %v3f %color
%loaded_lightPos = OpLoad %v4f %lightPos
%loaded_cameraPos = OpLoad %v4f %cameraPos
%loaded_params = OpLoad %v4f %params

; Normalize normal (just in case)
%normal_mag = OpVectorNorm %f32 %loaded_normal
%normalized_normal = OpSDiv %v3f %loaded_normal %normal_mag

; Light vector (L)
%light_vec = OpSub %v3f %loaded_lightPos %loaded_worldPos
%light_vec_norm = OpVectorNorm %f32 %light_vec
%normalized_light_vec = OpSDiv %v3f %light_vec %light_vec_norm

; Diffuse calculation
%dot_nl = OpDot %f32 %normalized_normal %normalized_light_vec
%diffuse_factor = OpMax %f32 %dot_nl %f0
%diffuse_color = OpFMul %v3f %loaded_color %diffuse_factor

; Ambient calculation
%ambient_color = OpVectorScalarSplat %v3f %f0_05 ; This is incorrect, should be (0.1, 0.05, 0.05)
%ambient_color_correct = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f %f0_1 %f0_05 %f0_05

; Specular calculation
%reflected_light = OpReflect %v3f %normalized_light_vec %normalized_normal
%reflected_light_norm = OpVectorNorm %f32 %reflected_light
%normalized_reflected_light = OpSDiv %v3f %reflected_light %reflected_light_norm

%specular_vec = OpSub %v3f %loaded_cameraPos %loaded_worldPos
%specular_vec_norm = OpVectorNorm %f32 %specular_vec
%normalized_specular_vec = OpSDiv %v3f %specular_vec %specular_vec_norm

%dot_rs = OpDot %f32 %normalized_reflected_light %normalized_specular_vec
%specular_factor = OpPow %f32 %dot_rs %f32_32
%specular_color = OpVectorScalarSplat %v3f %f1 ; This is incorrect, should be (1,1,1)
%specular_color_correct = OpVectorScalarSplat %v3f %f1

%final_specular_color = OpFMul %v3f %specular_color_correct %specular_factor

; Combine colors
%combined_color_rgb = OpAdd %v3f %ambient_color_correct %diffuse_color
%combined_color_rgb = OpAdd %v3f %combined_color_rgb %final_specular_color

; Clamp to [0,1]
%clamped_rgb = OpClamp %v3f %combined_color_rgb %f0 %f1

; Output color (alpha = 1.0)
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %clamped_rgb %f1

OpStore %outColor %final_color
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd
Rendered: missing
Reference
Test 42: Geometry Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly geometry shader. It will be assembled with
spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0) and rendered using a fixed vertex shader and fragment shader.

**Geometry shader requirements:**
- `OpCapability Geometry`
- `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- `OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main"` listing ALL interface variables
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (InputPoints/InputLines/Triangles/InputLinesAdjacency/InputTrianglesAdjacency)
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (OutputPoints/OutputLineStrip/OutputTriangleStrip)
- `OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices ` (max vertices emitted)
- `OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1`

**Input from vertex shader (per-vertex arrays):**
The input gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block (must be decorated with Block + BuiltIn Position).
```
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
; Array size depends on input primitive:
; InputPoints: 1, InputLines: 2, Triangles: 3
; InputLinesAdjacency: 4, InputTrianglesAdjacency: 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_N
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
; Access: OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_i %int_0 -> gl_in[i].gl_Position
```

User-defined inputs are also arrays of the same size:
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos[]; ; positions in clip space
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal[]; ; vertex normals
layout(location = 2) in vec3 color[]; ; per-vertex colors
```

**Output (per emitted vertex):**
The output gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block:
```
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Store: OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0 -> gl_out.gl_Position
```
```
layout(location = 0) out vec3 outColor; ; color for fragment shader
```

**Emit vertices with:** `OpEmitVertex` after storing gl_Position and outColor.
**End primitive with:** `OpEndPrimitive` after emitting a complete strip.

**Available UBO (set=0, binding=0) - accessible from geometry shader:**
Same layout as test 41 (model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params).

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text for the geometry shader.**


**Input primitive:** InputPoints (1 vertex per invocation, array size 1)
**Geometry:** 25 colored points in a 5x5 grid spread across [-0.8, 0.8].

**Task:** Expand each point into a small colored quad (4 vertices as triangle strip).
1. Read gl_in[0].gl_Position (the point position).
2. Read color[0] (the point's color).
3. Define a half-size: h = 0.04.
4. Emit 4 vertices forming a quad centered on the point:
- (x-h, y-h), (x+h, y-h), (x-h, y+h), (x+h, y+h)
- All with z=0, w=1, and the same color.
5. Output as triangle strip, max 4 vertices.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write GPU geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly. Geometry shaders receive primitives (points, lines, or triangles) and can output completely new geometry — for example, turning a single point into a billboard quad or a thin line into a thick ribbon.

Each subpass specifies a different input primitive type and a transformation task. The rendered output is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference image. Writing geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly requires precise control of vertex emission and primitive topology.

[Points to Diamonds] SPIR-V validation failed: error: line 15: Operand '14[%_struct_14]' requires a previous definition
%_ptr_Input_14 = OpTypePointer Input %_struct_14

Geometry Shader - Points to Diamonds (points)

View SPIR-V (4554 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 1
; Capabilities: Geometry
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; All types and constants will go here

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1 ; Signed
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0 ; Unsigned

; Pointers
%ptr_input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_input_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in_type

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0

%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1

; gl_PerVertex (Input)
%gl_PerVertex_in_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type 0 BuiltIn Position
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in_type %uint_1 ; InputPoints has array size 1
%ptr_input_arr_pv_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_pv_in Input

; gl_PerVertex (Output)
%gl_PerVertex_out_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out_type
%gl_Position_out = OpVariable %ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; User-defined Inputs
%arr_v3float_uint_1 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1
%ptr_input_arr_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_uint_1

%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpName %worldPos_in "worldPos"

%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpName %normal_in "normal"

%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
OpName %color_in "color"

; User-defined Output
%ptr_output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpName %outColor "outColor"

; Entry point
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_Position_out %outColor %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug info
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %gl_Position_out "gl_Position"
OpName %outColor "outColor"

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%label = OpLabel

    ; Get input gl_Position (worldPos)
    %idx_gl_in_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
    %in_pos = OpLoad %v4float %idx_gl_in_0

    ; Get input color
    %idx_color_in_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %color_in %int_0
    %in_color_val = OpLoad %v3float %idx_color_in_0
    
    ; Extract x, y, z, w from in_pos
    %x_val = OpCompositeExtract %float %in_pos 0
    %y_val = OpCompositeExtract %float %in_pos 1
    %z_val = OpCompositeExtract %float %in_pos 2
    %w_val = OpCompositeExtract %float %in_pos 3

    ; Calculate diamond vertices
    ; Top: (x, y+h, z, w)
    %y_plus_h = OpFAdd %float %y_val %float_0_05
    %pos_top = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_val %y_plus_h %z_val %w_val

    ; Right: (x+h, y, z, w)
    %x_plus_h = OpFAdd %float %x_val %float_0_05
    %pos_right = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_plus_h %y_val %z_val %w_val

    ; Left: (x-h, y, z, w)
    %x_minus_h = OpFSub %float %x_val %float_0_05
    %pos_left = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_minus_h %y_val %z_val %w_val

    ; Bottom: (x, y-h, z, w)
    %y_minus_h = OpFSub %float %y_val %float_0_05
    %pos_bottom = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_val %y_minus_h %z_val %w_val

    ; Emit vertices: top, right, left, bottom (triangle strip)

    ; Emit Top
    OpStore %gl_Position_out %pos_top
    OpStore %outColor %in_color_val
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Emit Right
    OpStore %gl_Position_out %pos_right
    OpStore %outColor %in_color_val
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Emit Left
    OpStore %gl_Position_out %pos_left
    OpStore %outColor %in_color_val
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Emit Bottom
    OpStore %gl_Position_out %pos_bottom
    OpStore %outColor %in_color_val
    OpEmitVertex

    OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Points to Hexagons (points)

View SPIR-V (7021 chars)
; SPIR-V Assembly for Geometry Shader
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Unknown
; Generator Tool: Unknown

OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

; Vectors
%v2f = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3f = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4f = OpTypeVector %float 4

; Constants
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0 ; For extending vec3 to vec4
%float_r = OpConstant %float 0.04 ; Radius

; Precomputed trigonometric values for hexagon angles (0, 60, 120, 180, 240, 300 degrees)
; Cosine values: 1.0, 0.5, -0.5, -1.0, -0.5, 0.5
; Sine values:   0.0, ~0.866, ~0.866, 0.0, ~-0.866, ~-0.866
%float_cos0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_sin0 = OpConstant %float 0.0

%float_cos60 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_sin60 = OpConstant %float 0.86602540378

%float_cos120 = OpConstant %float -0.5
%float_sin120 = OpConstant %float 0.86602540378

%float_cos180 = OpConstant %float -1.0
%float_sin180 = OpConstant %float 0.0

%float_cos240 = OpConstant %float -0.5
%float_sin240 = OpConstant %float -0.86602540378

%float_cos300 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_sin300 = OpConstant %float -0.86602540378

%float_darker_scale = OpConstant %float 0.8

; Structs for per-vertex data
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4f
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4f
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

; Pointers to structs
%ptr_in_pv = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out

; Array for input gl_PerVertex (InputPoints means size 1)
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in

; Variable for gl_in (input gl_Position array)
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; User-defined inputs (assuming they are vec3 as per prompt)
%ptr_in_v3f = OpTypePointer Input %v3f
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3f Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3f Input

; User-defined outputs (color for fragment shader)
%ptr_out_v3f = OpTypePointer Output %v3f
%outColor_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3f Output

; Variable for gl_out (output gl_Position)
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; Entry Point declaration
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor_out
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 18
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Main function definition
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_params = OpTypeFunction %void
%main = OpFunction %void %void_params

; --- Function Body ---

; Load input values for the single point (InputPoints -> array size 1)
; worldPos is vec3, needs to be extended to vec4 for gl_Position
%center_pos_v3 = OpLoad %v3f %worldPos_in
%center_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %center_pos_v3 %float_1 ; Extend vec3 to vec4 with w=1.0

%center_color = OpLoad %v3f %color_in

; Define radius and darker scale
%r = %float_r
%darker_scale = %float_darker_scale

; Helper variables for output storage
%ptr_out_v4_gl_pos = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_pv %gl_out %int_0
%ptr_out_v3_color = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v3f %outColor_out %int_0

; --- Emit 6 triangles as triangle strips (3 vertices each) ---
; Primitive 1: center, edge0, edge1
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %center_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %center_color
OpEmitVertex

%edge0_offset = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f (OpFMul %float %r %float_cos0) (OpFMul %float %r %float_sin0) %float_0
%edge0_pos = OpFAdd %v4f %center_pos (OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %edge0_offset %float_0)
%edge0_color = OpFMul %v3f %center_color %darker_scale
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge0_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge0_color
OpEmitVertex

%edge1_offset = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f (OpFMul %float %r %float_cos60) (OpFMul %float %r %float_sin60) %float_0
%edge1_pos = OpFAdd %v4f %center_pos (OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %edge1_offset %float_0)
%edge1_color = OpFMul %v3f %center_color %darker_scale
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge1_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge1_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

; Primitive 2: center, edge1, edge2
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %center_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %center_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge1_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge1_color
OpEmitVertex

%edge2_offset = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f (OpFMul %float %r %float_cos120) (OpFMul %float %r %float_sin120) %float_0
%edge2_pos = OpFAdd %v4f %center_pos (OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %edge2_offset %float_0)
%edge2_color = OpFMul %v3f %center_color %darker_scale
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge2_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge2_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

; Primitive 3: center, edge2, edge3
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %center_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %center_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge2_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge2_color
OpEmitVertex

%edge3_offset = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f (OpFMul %float %r %float_cos180) (OpFMul %float %r %float_sin180) %float_0
%edge3_pos = OpFAdd %v4f %center_pos (OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %edge3_offset %float_0)
%edge3_color = OpFMul %v3f %center_color %darker_scale
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge3_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge3_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

; Primitive 4: center, edge3, edge4
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %center_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %center_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge3_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge3_color
OpEmitVertex

%edge4_offset = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f (OpFMul %float %r %float_cos240) (OpFMul %float %r %float_sin240) %float_0
%edge4_pos = OpFAdd %v4f %center_pos (OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %edge4_offset %float_0)
%edge4_color = OpFMul %v3f %center_color %darker_scale
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge4_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge4_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

; Primitive 5: center, edge4, edge5
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %center_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %center_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge4_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge4_color
OpEmitVertex

%edge5_offset = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f (OpFMul %float %r %float_cos300) (OpFMul %float %r %float_sin300) %float_0
%edge5_pos = OpFAdd %v4f %center_pos (OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %edge5_offset %float_0)
%edge5_color = OpFMul %v3f %center_color %darker_scale
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge5_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge5_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

; Primitive 6: center, edge5, edge0 (closes the hexagon)
OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %center_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %center_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge5_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge5_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %ptr_out_v4_gl_pos %edge0_pos
OpStore %ptr_out_v3_color %edge0_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Thick Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (5498 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1
               OpSource GLSL 450
               OpName %main "main"
               OpName %thickness "thickness"
               OpName %_arr_gl_PerVertex_Input "gl_PerVertex"
               OpMemberName %_arr_gl_PerVertex_Input 0 "gl_Position"
               OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
               OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
               OpName %normal "normal"
               OpName %color "color"
               OpName %_gl_PerVertex_Output "gl_PerVertex"
               OpMemberName %_gl_PerVertex_Output 0 "gl_Position"
               OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
               OpName %outColor "outColor"

       %void = OpTypeVoid
         %32 = OpTypeFunction %void
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
      %v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
      %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
      %uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
     %uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
     %uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
     %uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
     %uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
     %float_0_03 = OpConstant %float 0.03
     %float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
     %float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
     %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
     %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1

%_arr_gl_PerVertex_Input = OpTypeStruct %v4float
               OpMemberDecorate %_arr_gl_PerVertex_Input 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %_arr_gl_PerVertex_Input Block
%_arr_gl_PerVertex_Type = OpTypeArray %_arr_gl_PerVertex_Input %uint_2
%_ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_gl_PerVertex_Type
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float ; Pointer to single v3float (for access chain elements)
%_arr_v3float_Type = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2 ; Type for array of 2 v3floats
%_ptr_Input_arr_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_v3float_Type ; Pointer to array of 2 v3floats

       %gl_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex Input
     %worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float Input
      %normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float Input
       %color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float Input

%_gl_PerVertex_Output = OpTypeStruct %v4float
               OpMemberDecorate %_gl_PerVertex_Output 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %_gl_PerVertex_Output Block
%_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Output %_gl_PerVertex_Output
       %gl_out = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex Output
%_ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
     %outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v3float Output

               OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %color Location 2
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

%_ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

       %main = OpFunction %void None %32
         %5 = OpLabel
      %vec4_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0 %float_0
      %vec4_1 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_1 %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

          %p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %uint_0 %uint_0
          %p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr
          %p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %uint_1 %uint_0
          %p1 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr

          %c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color %uint_0
          %c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr
          %c1_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color %uint_1
          %c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr

          %dir = OpFSub %v4float %p1 %p0
          %dir_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %dir %dir %uint_0 %uint_1
          %neg_dir_y = OpFNegate %float (OpCompositeExtract %float %dir %uint_1)
          %dir_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir %uint_0
          %perp_raw = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_dir_y %dir_x

          %len_sq = OpDot %float %perp_raw %perp_raw
          %len = OpExtInst %float %1 Sqrt %len_sq
          %len_inv = OpFDiv %float %float_1 %len
          %perp_norm = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp_raw %len_inv
          %perp_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp_norm %float_0_03

          %perp_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %perp_scaled %float_0 %float_0 %float_0

          %p0_plus_perp = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %perp_v4
          %p0_minus_perp = OpFSub %v4float %p0 %perp_v4
          %p1_plus_perp = OpFAdd %v4float %p1 %perp_v4
          %p1_minus_perp = OpFSub %v4float %p1 %perp_v4

          %out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_out %uint_0
          %out_color_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v3float %outColor


               OpStore %out_color_ptr %c0
               OpStore %out_pos_ptr %p0_plus_perp
               OpEmitVertex

               OpStore %out_color_ptr %c0
               OpStore %out_pos_ptr %p0_minus_perp
               OpEmitVertex

               OpStore %out_color_ptr %c1
               OpStore %out_pos_ptr %p1_plus_perp
               OpEmitVertex

               OpStore %out_color_ptr %c1
               OpStore %out_pos_ptr %p1_minus_perp
               OpEmitVertex

               OpEndPrimitive
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Tapered Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (5740 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability InputGeometry
OpCapability OutputGeometry
OpCapability StoredInput
OpCapability StoredOutput
OpCapability GLSL450

OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types
%float_type = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float_type 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float_type 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float_type 4
%uint_type = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int_type = OpTypeInt 32 1
%bool_type = OpTypeBool
%void_type = OpTypeVoid

; Constants
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint_type 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint_type 2
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint_type 4

%int_0 = OpConstant %int_type 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int_type 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int_type 2

%float_0 = OpConstant %float_type 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float_type 1.0
%float_0_04 = OpConstant %float_type 0.04
%float_0_005 = OpConstant %float_type 0.005

; Input structure for gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

; Input array of gl_PerVertex (for InputLines)
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; User defined input variables (arrays of vec3)
%arr_v3_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_in
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input

; Output structure for gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; User defined output variable (vec3)
%ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

; Function types
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void_type

; Entry Point Function Type
%main_fn = OpTypeFunction %void_type

; Entry Point
%main = OpFunction %void_type %main_fn
    OpLabel

    ; --- Access input variables ---
    ; gl_in[i].gl_Position
    %ptr_gl_pos_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
    %ptr_gl_pos_1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0

    ; worldPos[i]
    %ptr_worldPos_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %worldPos %int_0
    %ptr_worldPos_1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %worldPos %int_1

    ; color[i]
    %ptr_color_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_0
    %ptr_color_1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_1

    ; Load input values
    %worldPos_0 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldPos_0
    %worldPos_1 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldPos_1
    %color_0 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_0
    %color_1 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_1

    ; --- Geometry Calculation ---
    ; Vector from p0 to p1
    %v = OpSub %v3float %worldPos_1 %worldPos_0

    ; Extract components of v for perpendicular calculation
    %v_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float_type %v %int_0
    %v_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float_type %v %int_1

    ; Perpendicular vector in XY plane: (-v_y, v_x, 0.0)
    %perp_xy = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float (OpNegate %float_type %v_y), %v_x, %float_0

    ; Calculate length squared of perp_xy to normalize it.
    ; length^2 = (-v_y)^2 + v_x^2
    %perp_xy_len_sq = OpFMul %float_type %v_y (OpNegate %float_type %v_y) ; (-v_y)^2
    %perp_xy_len_sq = OpFAdd %float_type %perp_xy_len_sq (%OpFMul %float_type %v_x %v_x) ; + v_x^2

    ; Check if length squared is zero.
    %is_zero_len = OpExtInst %bool %GLSL450 FUnordEq %perp_xy_len_sq %float_0

    ; Default perpendicular if line is degenerate in XY (e.g., (1,0,0))
    %default_perp_xy = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %float_1 %float_0 %float_0

    ; Calculate normalized perpendicular vector.
    ; If length is near zero, use default_perp_xy, otherwise use perp_xy / sqrt(length_sq).
    %sqrt_len_sq = OpSqrt %float_type %perp_xy_len_sq
    ; Use OpSelect to choose between normalized vector and default.
    ; If is_zero_len is true, use default_perp_xy. Otherwise, use perp_xy / sqrt_len_sq.
    %normalized_part = OpDiv %v3float %perp_xy %sqrt_len_sq
    %perp_normalized_xy = OpSelect %v3float %default_perp_xy %normalized_part %is_zero_len

    ; --- Emit Vertices (Triangle Strip) ---
    ; Vertex 0: p0 + perp * thick_start, color0
    %offset_p0_start = OpFMul %v3float %perp_normalized_xy %float_0_04
    %v0_pos = OpAdd %v3float %worldPos_0 %offset_p0_start
    %v0_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v0_pos.x %v0_pos.y %v0_pos.z %float_1 ; w = 1.0
    OpStore %ptr_gl_out_pos_0 %v0_final_pos
    OpStore %outColor %color_0
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Vertex 1: p0 - perp * thick_start, color0
    %offset_p0_start_neg = OpFNegate %v3float %offset_p0_start
    %v1_pos = OpAdd %v3float %worldPos_0 %offset_p0_start_neg
    %v1_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v1_pos.x %v1_pos.y %v1_pos.z %float_1 ; w = 1.0
    OpStore %ptr_gl_out_pos_0 %v1_final_pos
    OpStore %outColor %color_0
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Vertex 2: p1 + perp * thick_end, color1
    %offset_p1_end = OpFMul %v3float %perp_normalized_xy %float_0_005
    %v2_pos = OpAdd %v3float %worldPos_1 %offset_p1_end
    %v2_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v2_pos.x %v2_pos.y %v2_pos.z %float_1 ; w = 1.0
    OpStore %ptr_gl_out_pos_0 %v2_final_pos
    OpStore %outColor %color_1
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Vertex 3: p1 - perp * thick_end, color1
    %offset_p1_end_neg = OpFNegate %v3float %offset_p1_end
    %v3_pos = OpAdd %v3float %worldPos_1 %offset_p1_end_neg
    %v3_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v3_pos.x %v3_pos.y %v3_pos.z %float_1 ; w = 1.0
    OpStore %ptr_gl_out_pos_0 %v3_final_pos
    OpStore %outColor %color_1
    OpEmitVertex

    ; End primitive
    OpEndPrimitive

    OpReturn
OpEndFunction

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL; 14
; Capabilities: Geometry
; Extensions: SPV_EXT_shader_viewport_index_layer
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport %glsl = "GLSL.std.450"
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor %ubo
OpExecutionMode %main InputTriangles
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; All types, structures, and constants
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
; %uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4 ; Not strictly needed but kept for consistency with previous thought process
; %uint_7 = OpConstant %uint 7 ; Not strictly needed here, was for shuffle which I replaced with CompositeConstruct

%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
; %int_3 = OpConstant %int 3 ; Not strictly needed here

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_0_08 = OpConstant %float 0.08
%float_3 = OpConstant %float 3
; %float_0_33333334 = OpConstant %float 0.33333334 ; Not strictly needed, using direct division

; Composite constants
%v4float_0_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0 %float_0
%v3float_3 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_3 %float_3 %float_3

; Pointer Types
%ptr_input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

; gl_PerVertex (Input)
%gl_PerVertex_in_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type Block
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in_type = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in_type %uint_3
%ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in_type

; gl_PerVertex (Output)
%gl_PerVertex_out_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type Block
%ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out_type

; User defined inputs (arrays of 3 vec3)
%arr_v3float_in_type = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3
%ptr_input_arr_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_in_type

; UBO Types (from test 41 description)
%type_UBO = OpTypeStruct %m4v4float %m4v4float %m4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %type_UBO Block
%ptr_uniform_type_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %type_UBO

; Global variables
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in Input
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out Output
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3float Output
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_type_UBO Uniform

; Annotations (Decorations for locations)
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %color Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%label = OpLabel

; Read input positions (gl_Position)
%gl_in_0_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %uint_0 %uint_0
%load_p0_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %gl_in_0_pos_ptr
%gl_in_1_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %uint_1 %uint_0
%load_p1_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %gl_in_1_pos_ptr
%gl_in_2_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %uint_2 %uint_0
%load_p2_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %gl_in_2_pos_ptr

; Convert p0, p1, p2 (v4float) to v3float for face normal calculations
; Extract x, y, z components
%p0_v3_calc = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %load_p0_v4 %v4float_0_0_0_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
%p1_v3_calc = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %load_p1_v4 %v4float_0_0_0_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
%p2_v3_calc = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %load_p2_v4 %v4float_0_0_0_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2

; Compute face center: center = (p0 + p1 + p2) / 3.
%p0_plus_p1 = OpFAdd %v3float %p0_v3_calc %p1_v3_calc
%sum_p = OpFAdd %v3float %p0_plus_p1 %p2_v3_calc
%center_v3 = OpFDiv %v3float %sum_p %v3float_3

; Compute face normal: e1 = p1-p0, e2 = p2-p0, N = normalize(cross(e1, e2)).
%e1 = OpFSub %v3float %p1_v3_calc %p0_v3_calc
%e2 = OpFSub %v3float %p2_v3_calc %p0_v3_calc

%cross_e1_e2 = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Cross %e1 %e2
%N = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %cross_e1_e2

; Offset = N * 0.08
%offset_v3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %N %float_0_08

; Prepare offset_v4 (vec4(offset_v3, 0)) for adding to gl_Position
%offset_v4_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset_v3 %uint_0
%offset_v4_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset_v3 %uint_1
%offset_v4_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset_v3 %uint_2
%offset_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %offset_v4_x %offset_v4_y %offset_v4_z %float_0

; Emit 3 vertices, each shifted by the offset and colored with original color
; Vertex 0
%new_pos_0 = OpFAdd %v4float %load_p0_v4 %offset_v4
OpStore %gl_out %new_pos_0

%color_0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %uint_0
%load_c0_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %color_0_ptr
OpStore %outColor %load_c0_v3
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1
%new_pos_1 = OpFAdd %v4float %load_p1_v4 %offset_v4
OpStore %gl_out %new_pos_1

%color_1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %uint_1
%load_c1_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %color_1_ptr
OpStore %outColor %load_c1_v3
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2
%new_pos_2 = OpFAdd %v4float %load_p2_v4 %offset_v4
OpStore %gl_out %new_pos_2

%color_2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %uint_2
%load_c2_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %color_2_ptr
OpStore %outColor %load_c2_v3
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Shrunk Triangles (triangles)

View SPIR-V (8136 chars)
; SPIR-V Assembly for Geometry Shader
; Task: Shrink each triangle toward its centroid.

; --- UBO (Uniform Buffer Object) ---
; Assume std140 layout for alignment
%mat4f = OpTypeMatrix %float 4 4
%vec3f = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4f = OpTypeVector %float 4
%float_params = OpTypeArray %float %uint_4 ; Assuming 4 float parameters

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4f %mat4f %mat4f %vec3f %vec4f %float_params
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0            ; Model Matrix
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64           ; View Matrix
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128          ; Projection Matrix
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192          ; Light Position (vec3)
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208          ; Camera Position (vec4)
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224          ; Parameters (4 floats)

%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; --- Header and Capabilities ---
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; --- Entry Point and Execution Modes ---
; Input primitive: Triangles (3 vertices)
; Output primitive: TriangleStrip (3 vertices)
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor_out
OpExecutionMode %main Input
OpExecutionMode %main Triangles
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; --- Type Declarations ---
%void = OpTypeVoid
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2f = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3f = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4f = OpTypeVector %float 4
%v4i = OpTypeVector %int 4

; --- Constants ---
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_3 = OpConstant %float 3.0

; --- Input Structures ---
; Per-vertex input block (for gl_Position)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4f
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

; Array of per-vertex inputs (size 3 for Triangles)
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_3
%gl_in = OpVariable %arr_pv_in Input ; Array of gl_PerVertex_in

; User-defined inputs
%arr_v3f_in = OpTypeArray %v3f %uint_3
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %arr_v3f_in Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %arr_v3f_in Input
%color_in = OpVariable %arr_v3f_in Input

; --- Output Structures ---
; Per-vertex output block (for gl_Position)
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4f
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

; Output variables (scalar/vector types for each emitted vertex)
%gl_out = OpVariable Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%outColor_out = OpVariable Output %v3f

; --- Function: main ---
%main = OpFunction %void None %entry_point_args
%entry_point_args = OpTypeFunction %void

    ; Get pointers to interface variables
    %ptr_gl_in = OpFunctionCall %void %get_gl_in
    %ptr_worldPos_in = OpFunctionCall %void %get_worldPos_in
    %ptr_normal_in = OpFunctionCall %void %get_normal_in
    %ptr_color_in = OpFunctionCall %void %get_color_in
    %ptr_gl_out = OpFunctionCall %void %get_gl_out
    %ptr_outColor_out = OpFunctionCall %void %get_outColor_out
    
    ; --- Access Input Data ---
    ; Access gl_in[i].gl_Position for i = 0, 1, 2
    %ptr_gl_pos_0 = OpAccessChain %v4f %ptr_gl_in %uint_0 %uint_0
    %ptr_gl_pos_1 = OpAccessChain %v4f %ptr_gl_in %uint_1 %uint_0
    %ptr_gl_pos_2 = OpAccessChain %v4f %ptr_gl_in %uint_2 %uint_0

    ; Access user-defined inputs for i = 0, 1, 2
    %ptr_worldPos_0 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_worldPos_in %uint_0
    %ptr_worldPos_1 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_worldPos_in %uint_1
    %ptr_worldPos_2 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_worldPos_in %uint_2

    %ptr_color_0 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_color_in %uint_0
    %ptr_color_1 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_color_in %uint_1
    %ptr_color_2 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_color_in %uint_2

    ; --- Access UBO ---
    %ptr_ubo = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_UBO %ubo %uint_5 ; Pointer to params array (index 5)
    %params = OpLoad %float_params %ptr_ubo

    ; --- Compute Centroid ---
    %pos_0 = OpLoad %v4f %ptr_gl_pos_0
    %pos_1 = OpLoad %v4f %ptr_gl_pos_1
    %pos_2 = OpLoad %v4f %ptr_gl_pos_2

    ; Summing components
    %sum_x = OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_0 0) (OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_1 0) (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_2 0))
    %sum_y = OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_0 1) (OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_1 1) (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_2 1))
    %sum_z = OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_0 2) (OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_1 2) (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_2 2))
    %sum_w = OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_0 3) (OpFAdd %float (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_1 3) (OpExtractComponent %float %pos_2 3))

    %centroid_x = OpFDiv %float %sum_x %float_3
    %centroid_y = OpFDiv %float %sum_y %float_3
    %centroid_z = OpFDiv %float %sum_z %float_3
    %centroid_w = OpFDiv %float %sum_w %float_3 ; W component for centroid

    %centroid = OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %centroid_x %centroid_y %centroid_z %centroid_w

    ; --- Shrink Vertices ---
    %shrink_factor_val = OpExtractComponent %float %params 0 ; Use params[0] as the shrink factor
    %shrink_factor = %shrink_factor_val
    
    ; Vertex 0
    %vec_0 = OpFSub %v4f %pos_0 %centroid
    %shrunk_vec_0 = OpFMul %v4f %shrink_factor %vec_0
    %new_pos_0 = OpFAdd %v4f %centroid %shrunk_vec_0
    
    ; Vertex 1
    %vec_1 = OpFSub %v4f %pos_1 %centroid
    %shrunk_vec_1 = OpFMul %v4f %shrink_factor %vec_1
    %new_pos_1 = OpFAdd %v4f %centroid %shrunk_vec_1

    ; Vertex 2
    %vec_2 = OpFSub %v4f %pos_2 %centroid
    %shrunk_vec_2 = OpFMul %v4f %shrink_factor %vec_2
    %new_pos_2 = OpFAdd %v4f %centroid %shrunk_vec_2

    ; --- Emit Vertices ---
    ; Emit Vertex 0
    %ptr_out_pos_0 = OpAccessChain %v4f %ptr_gl_out %uint_0
    OpStore %ptr_out_pos_0 %new_pos_0
    %color_0 = OpLoad %v3f %ptr_color_0
    %ptr_outColor_0 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_outColor_out %uint_0 ; Assuming direct access to output color array
    OpStore %ptr_outColor_0 %color_0
    OpEmitVertex
    
    ; Emit Vertex 1
    %ptr_out_pos_1 = OpAccessChain %v4f %ptr_gl_out %uint_1
    OpStore %ptr_out_pos_1 %new_pos_1
    %color_1 = OpLoad %v3f %ptr_color_1
    %ptr_outColor_1 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_outColor_out %uint_1 ; Assuming direct access to output color array
    OpStore %ptr_outColor_1 %color_1
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Emit Vertex 2
    %ptr_out_pos_2 = OpAccessChain %v4f %ptr_gl_out %uint_2
    OpStore %ptr_out_pos_2 %new_pos_2
    %color_2 = OpLoad %v3f %ptr_color_2
    %ptr_outColor_2 = OpAccessChain %v3f %ptr_outColor_out %uint_2 ; Assuming direct access to output color array
    OpStore %ptr_outColor_2 %color_2
    OpEmitVertex

    OpEndPrimitive
    OpReturn
OpEndFunction

; Helper functions to get pointers to interface variables (simplification)
%get_gl_in = OpFunction %void None %void_args
%void_args = OpTypeFunction %void
    %ptr = OpVariable %arr_pv_in Input ; Must match the type of %gl_in
    OpReturnValue %ptr
OpEndFunction

%get_worldPos_in = OpFunction %void None %void_args
    %ptr = OpVariable %arr_v3f_in Input ; Must match the type of %worldPos_in
    OpReturnValue %ptr
OpEndFunction

%get_normal_in = OpFunction %void None %void_args
    %ptr = OpVariable %arr_v3f_in Input ; Must match the type of %normal_in
    OpReturnValue %ptr
OpEndFunction

%get_color_in = OpFunction %void None %void_args
    %ptr = OpVariable %arr_v3f_in Input ; Must match the type of %color_in
    OpReturnValue %ptr
OpEndFunction

%get_gl_out = OpFunction %void None %void_args
    %ptr = OpVariable %gl_PerVertex_out Output ; Must match the type of %gl_out
    OpReturnValue %ptr
OpEndFunction

%get_outColor_out = OpFunction %void None %void_args
    %ptr = OpVariable %v3f Output ; Must match the type of %outColor_out
    OpReturnValue %ptr
OpEndFunction
