View SPIR-V (8774 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_Position_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_Position_out %outColor_out
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 10
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug info (optional, but good practice for readability)
OpSource GLSL 450
OpSourceExtension "GL_ARB_separate_shader_objects"
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_Position_in "gl_Position"
OpName %worldPos_in "worldPos"
OpName %normal_in "normal"
OpName %color_in "color"
OpName %gl_Position_out "gl_Position"
OpName %outColor_out "outColor"

; Decorations for BuiltIns and Locations
OpDecorate %gl_Position_in BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
OpDecorate %gl_Position_out BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %outColor_out Location 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1

; gl_PerVertex_in block
%gl_PerVertex_in_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type Block

; gl_PerVertex_out block
%gl_PerVertex_out_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type Block

; Pointers
%ptr_input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_function_int = OpTypePointer Function %int
%ptr_function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%ptr_function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%ptr_uniform_mat4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4
%ptr_uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; Constants
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5
%uint_10 = OpConstant %uint 10
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_02 = OpConstant %float 0.02
%float_0_25 = OpConstant %float 0.25
%float_neg_1_0 = OpConstant %float -1.0
%v3float_0_0_0_const = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0
%v4float_0_0_0_1_const = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_1_0

; Input arrays for gl_Position
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in_4 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in_type %uint_4
%ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in_4
%gl_Position_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in Input

; Input arrays for user-defined attributes
%arr_v3float_4 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%ptr_input_arr_v3float_4 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_4
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float_4 Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float_4 Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float_4 Input

; Output variables
%gl_Position_out = OpVariable %ptr_output_v4float Output
%outColor_out = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3float Output

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - same layout as test 41
%type_ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %type_ubo_struct Block

%ptr_ubo_type_ubo_struct = OpTypePointer Uniform %type_ubo_struct
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo_type_ubo_struct Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; UBO member pointers (for consistency with test 41, though not all are used)
%ubo_model_ac = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_mat4 %ubo %uint_0
%ubo_view_ac = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_mat4 %ubo %uint_1
%ubo_proj_ac = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_mat4 %ubo %uint_2
%ubo_lightPos_ac = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4float %ubo %uint_3
%ubo_cameraPos_ac = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4float %ubo %uint_4
%ubo_params_ac = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4float %ubo %uint_5

; Function main
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%entry = OpLabel

; Load input worldPos (P0, P1, P2, P3) - used for geometric calculations (despite "clip space" label)
%worldPos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %worldPos_in %uint_0
%worldPos1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %worldPos_in %uint_1
%worldPos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %worldPos_in %uint_2
%worldPos3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %worldPos_in %uint_3

%worldPos0_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos0_ptr
%worldPos1_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos1_ptr
%worldPos2_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos2_ptr
%worldPos3_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos3_ptr

; Load input colors for interpolation (Color1, Color2)
%color1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color_in %uint_1
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color_in %uint_2

%color1_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %color1_ptr
%color2_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr

; Tangents for smooth perpendiculars
; T_start = P2 - P0
; T_end = P3 - P1
%T_start_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %worldPos2_v3 %worldPos0_v3
%T_end_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %worldPos3_v3 %worldPos1_v3

; Thickness constant
%thickness_val = OpCopyObject %float %float_0_02

; Loop variable i (0 to 4)
%loop_var_i = OpVariable %ptr_function_int Function
OpStore %loop_var_i %int_0

%loop_header = OpLabel
%i_val = OpLoad %int %loop_var_i
%loop_continue_cond = OpSLessThan %bool %i_val %int_5
OpLoopMerge %loop_end %loop_body None
OpBranchConditional %loop_continue_cond %loop_body %loop_end

%loop_body = OpLabel
; Calculate t (0.0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0)
%i_float = OpConvertSToF %float %i_val
%t_val = OpFMul %float %i_float %float_0_25

; Interpolate Position (linear between P1 and P2)
%one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %t_val
%interp_P1_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %worldPos1_v3 %one_minus_t
%interp_P2_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %worldPos2_v3 %t_val
%interp_pos_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %interp_P1_term %interp_P2_term

; Interpolate Tangent (linear between T_start and T_end for perpendicular direction)
%interp_T_start_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %T_start_v3 %one_minus_t
%interp_T_end_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %T_end_v3 %t_val
%interp_tangent_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %interp_T_start_term %interp_T_end_term
%norm_interp_tangent_v3 = OpNormalize %v3float %interp_tangent_v3

; Calculate Perpendicular in XY plane (for a 2D-like thickness effect)
%tangent_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %norm_interp_tangent_v3 %int_0
%tangent_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %norm_interp_tangent_v3 %int_1
%neg_tangent_y = OpFNegate %float %tangent_y
%perp_xy_v3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %neg_tangent_y %tangent_x %float_0_0

; Normalize and scale by thickness
%norm_perp_xy_v3 = OpNormalize %v3float %perp_xy_v3
%scaled_perp_v3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %norm_perp_xy_v3 %thickness_val

; Calculate pos + perp and pos - perp (still in vec3 clip space)
%pos_plus_perp_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %interp_pos_v3 %scaled_perp_v3
%pos_minus_perp_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %interp_pos_v3 %scaled_perp_v3

; Convert final vec3 positions to vec4 (gl_Position expects vec4)
%final_pos_plus_perp_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %pos_plus_perp_v3 %float_1_0
%final_pos_minus_perp_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %pos_minus_perp_v3 %float_1_0

; Interpolate Color (linear between color[1] and color[2])
%interp_color1_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color1_v3 %one_minus_t
%interp_color2_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color2_v3 %t_val
%interp_color_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %interp_color1_term %interp_color2_term

; Emit pos + perp vertex
OpStore %gl_Position_out %final_pos_plus_perp_v4
OpStore %outColor_out %interp_color_v3
OpEmitVertex

; Emit pos - perp vertex
OpStore %gl_Position_out %final_pos_minus_perp_v4
OpStore %outColor_out %interp_color_v3
OpEmitVertex

; Increment loop variable
%i_next = OpIAdd %int %i_val %int_1
OpStore %loop_var_i %i_next
OpBranch %loop_header

%loop_end = OpLabel
OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 11
; Capabilities: Geometry
; Extensions:
OpCapability Shader
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_PerVertex_in_arr %worldPos_in_arr %normal_in_arr %color_in_arr %gl_PerVertex_out_var %outColor %ubo_var
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 8
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; All types must be defined first
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4 ; Array size for InputLinesAdjacency
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5
%uint_8 = OpConstant %uint 8

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_02 = OpConstant %float 0.02 ; Thickness
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_1_div_3 = OpConstant %float 0.33333334
%float_2_div_3 = OpConstant %float 0.6666667
%float_epsilon = OpConstant %float 0.00001

; gl_PerVertex_in block
%gl_PerVertex_in_struct = OpTypeStruct %v4float ; { vec4 }
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_struct 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_struct Block
%gl_PerVertex_in_arr_type = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in_struct %uint_4
%ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in_arr_type
%gl_PerVertex_in_arr = OpVariable %ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in Input

; worldPos input (Location 0)
%ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%arr_Input_v3float_4 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%worldPos_in_arr = OpVariable %arr_Input_v3float_4 Input
OpDecorate %worldPos_in_arr Location 0

; normal input (Location 1)
%normal_in_arr = OpVariable %arr_Input_v3float_4 Input
OpDecorate %normal_in_arr Location 1

; color input (Location 2)
%color_in_arr = OpVariable %arr_Input_v3float_4 Input
OpDecorate %color_in_arr Location 2

; gl_PerVertex_out block
%gl_PerVertex_out_struct = OpTypeStruct %v4float ; { vec4 }
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_struct 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_struct Block
%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out_struct
%gl_PerVertex_out_var = OpVariable %ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; outColor output (Location 0)
%ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO definition
%UBO_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 5 Offset 224 ; params.x should be thickness, y,z,w other
OpDecorate %UBO_struct Block
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_struct
%ubo_var = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

; UBO member access constants
%uint_ubo_model = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_ubo_view = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_ubo_proj = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_ubo_cameraPos = OpConstant %uint 4

%ptr_Uniform_mat4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4
%ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; Helper function: world_to_clip (transforms v3 world position to v4 clip position)
%func_world_to_clip_type = OpTypeFunction %v4float %v3float %mat4 %mat4 %mat4
%world_to_clip = OpFunction %v4float None %func_world_to_clip_type
%param_w_pos = OpFunctionParameter %v3float
%param_model_mat = OpFunctionParameter %mat4
%param_view_mat = OpFunctionParameter %mat4
%param_proj_mat = OpFunctionParameter %mat4
%wtc_label = OpLabel
%w_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %param_w_pos %float_1_0
%model_x_world = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %param_model_mat %w_pos_v4
%view_x_model = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %param_view_mat %model_x_world
%clip_pos = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %param_proj_mat %view_x_model
OpReturnValue %clip_pos
OpFunctionEnd

; Helper function: world_vec_to_clip_vec (transforms v3 world vector to v4 clip vector)
%func_world_vec_to_clip_vec_type = OpTypeFunction %v4float %v3float %mat4 %mat4 %mat4
%world_vec_to_clip_vec = OpFunction %v4float None %func_world_vec_to_clip_vec_type
%param_w_vec = OpFunctionParameter %v3float
%param_model_mat_vec = OpFunctionParameter %mat4
%param_view_mat_vec = OpFunctionParameter %mat4
%param_proj_mat_vec = OpFunctionParameter %mat4
%wvtcv_label = OpLabel
%w_vec_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %param_w_vec %float_0_0 ; w=0 for vector
%model_x_world_vec = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %param_model_mat_vec %w_vec_v4
%view_x_model_vec = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %param_view_mat_vec %model_x_world_vec
%clip_vec = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %param_proj_mat_vec %view_x_model_vec
OpReturnValue %clip_vec
OpFunctionEnd


%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%entry = OpLabel

; --- Load UBO data ---
%ubo_model_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_mat4 %ubo_var %uint_ubo_model
%ubo_model = OpLoad %mat4 %ubo_model_ptr
%ubo_view_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_mat4 %ubo_var %uint_ubo_view
%ubo_view = OpLoad %mat4 %ubo_view_ptr
%ubo_proj_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_mat4 %ubo_var %uint_ubo_proj
%ubo_proj = OpLoad %mat4 %ubo_proj_ptr
%ubo_cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo_var %uint_ubo_cameraPos
%ubo_cameraPos = OpLoad %v4float %ubo_cameraPos_ptr

; --- Get input world positions, normals, and colors (using indices 0, 1, 2, 3) ---
%P0_world_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos_in_arr %int_0
%P0_world = OpLoad %v3float %P0_world_ptr
%P1_world_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos_in_arr %int_1
%P1_world = OpLoad %v3float %P1_world_ptr
%P2_world_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos_in_arr %int_2
%P2_world = OpLoad %v3float %P2_world_ptr
%P3_world_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos_in_arr %int_3
%P3_world = OpLoad %v3float %P3_world_ptr

%normal1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %normal_in_arr %int_1
%normal1 = OpLoad %v3float %normal1_ptr
%normal2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %normal_in_arr %int_2
%normal2 = OpLoad %v3float %normal2_ptr

%color1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %color_in_arr %int_1
%color1 = OpLoad %v3float %color1_ptr
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %color_in_arr %int_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr

; --- Calculate Tangents and Perpendiculars in World Space ---
; Tangent at P1: from P0 to P2
%P2_sub_P0 = OpFSub %v3float %P2_world %P0_world
%D1 = OpNormalize %v3float %P2_sub_P0

; Tangent at P2: from P1 to P3
%P3_sub_P1 = OpFSub %v3float %P3_world %P1_world
%D2 = OpNormalize %v3float %P3_sub_P1

; Perpendicular at P1 (in world space)
%perp1_candidate = OpCross %v3float %D1 %normal1
%perp1_len_sq = OpDot %float %perp1_candidate %perp1_candidate
%is_perp1_zero = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %perp1_len_sq %float_epsilon
%up_world = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %float_0_0 %float_1_0 %float_0_0 ; Fallback "up" vector
%fallback_perp1 = OpCross %v3float %D1 %up_world
%perp1_unnorm = OpSelect %v3float %is_perp1_zero %fallback_perp1 %perp1_candidate
%perp1 = OpNormalize %v3float %perp1_unnorm

; Perpendicular at P2 (in world space)
%perp2_candidate = OpCross %v3float %D2 %normal2
%perp2_len_sq = OpDot %float %perp2_candidate %perp2_candidate
%is_perp2_zero = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %perp2_len_sq %float_epsilon
%fallback_perp2 = OpCross %v3float %D2 %up_world
%perp2_unnorm = OpSelect %v3float %is_perp2_zero %fallback_perp2 %perp2_candidate
%perp2 = OpNormalize %v3float %perp2_unnorm

; Scale perpendiculars by thickness
%perp1_scaled_world = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp1 %float_0_02
%perp2_scaled_world = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp2 %float_0_02

; Transform scaled perpendiculars to clip space for offset application
%perp1_scaled_clip_vec = OpFunctionCall %v4float %world_vec_to_clip_vec %perp1_scaled_world %ubo_model %ubo_view %ubo_proj
%perp2_scaled_clip_vec = OpFunctionCall %v4float %world_vec_to_clip_vec %perp2_scaled_world %ubo_model %ubo_view %ubo_proj

; --- Calculate intermediate base points and colors along the P1-P2 segment ---
%P2_sub_P1_world_base = OpFSub %v3float %P2_world %P1_world

; P_mid1_world = P1_world + (P2_world - P1_world) * (1/3)
%dir_mul_1_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %P2_sub_P1_world_base %float_1_div_3
%P_mid1_world = OpFAdd %v3float %P1_world %dir_mul_1_3

; P_mid2_world = P1_world + (P2_world - P1_world) * (2/3)
%dir_mul_2_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %P2_sub_P1_world_base %float_2_div_3
%P_mid2_world = OpFAdd %v3float %P1_world %dir_mul_2_3

; Interpolated colors: Color at point X = color1 * (1-t) + color2 * t, where t is fraction along P1-P2.
; Color at P_mid1 (t = 1/3): color1 * (2/3) + color2 * (1/3)
%color1_mul_2_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color1 %float_2_div_3
%color2_mul_1_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color2 %float_1_div_3
%color_mid1 = OpFAdd %v3float %color1_mul_2_3 %color2_mul_1_3

; Color at P_mid2 (t = 2/3): color1 * (1/3) + color2 * (2/3)
%color1_mul_1_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color1 %float_1_div_3
%color2_mul_2_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color2 %float_2_div_3
%color_mid2 = OpFAdd %v3float %color1_mul_1_3 %color2_mul_2_3

; --- Transform base points to clip space ---
%P1_clip_base = OpFunctionCall %v4float %world_to_clip %P1_world %ubo_model %ubo_view %ubo_proj
%P_mid1_clip_base = OpFunctionCall %v4float %world_to_clip %P_mid1_world %ubo_model %ubo_view %ubo_proj
%P_mid2_clip_base = OpFunctionCall %v4float %world_to_clip %P_mid2_world %ubo_model %ubo_view %ubo_proj
%P2_clip_base = OpFunctionCall %v4float %world_to_clip %P2_world %ubo_model %ubo_view %ubo_proj

; --- Interpolate perpendicular vectors for intermediate points ---
; perp_at_mid1_scaled_clip = perp1_scaled_clip * (2/3) + perp2_scaled_clip * (1/3)
%perp1_scaled_clip_mul_2_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp1_scaled_clip_vec %float_2_div_3
%perp2_scaled_clip_mul_1_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp2_scaled_clip_vec %float_1_div_3
%perp_mid1_scaled_clip_vec = OpFAdd %v4float %perp1_scaled_clip_mul_2_3 %perp2_scaled_clip_mul_1_3

; perp_at_mid2_scaled_clip = perp1_scaled_clip * (1/3) + perp2_scaled_clip * (2/3)
%perp1_scaled_clip_mul_1_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp1_scaled_clip_vec %float_1_div_3
%perp2_scaled_clip_mul_2_3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp2_scaled_clip_vec %float_2_div_3
%perp_mid2_scaled_clip_vec = OpFAdd %v4float %perp1_scaled_clip_mul_1_3 %perp2_scaled_clip_mul_2_3


; --- Segment 1: P1 to P_mid1 (Draw this part) ---
; Vertices for the first quad (triangle strip):
; P1_top = P1_clip_base + perp1_scaled_clip_vec
; P1_bottom = P1_clip_base - perp1_scaled_clip_vec
; P_mid1_top = P_mid1_clip_base + perp_mid1_scaled_clip_vec
; P_mid1_bottom = P_mid1_clip_base - perp_mid1_scaled_clip_vec

%P1_top = OpFAdd %v4float %P1_clip_base %perp1_scaled_clip_vec
%P1_bottom = OpFSub %v4float %P1_clip_base %perp1_scaled_clip_vec
%P_mid1_top = OpFAdd %v4float %P_mid1_clip_base %perp_mid1_scaled_clip_vec
%P_mid1_bottom = OpFSub %v4float %P_mid1_clip_base %perp_mid1_scaled_clip_vec

; Emit P1_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P1_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex
; Emit P1_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P1_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex
; Emit P_mid1_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P_mid1_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color_mid1
OpEmitVertex
; Emit P_mid1_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P_mid1_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color_mid1
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; --- Segment 2: P_mid2 to P2 (Draw this part) ---
; Vertices for the second quad (triangle strip):
; P_mid2_top = P_mid2_clip_base + perp_mid2_scaled_clip_vec
; P_mid2_bottom = P_mid2_clip_base - perp_mid2_scaled_clip_vec
; P2_top = P2_clip_base + perp2_scaled_clip_vec
; P2_bottom = P2_clip_base - perp2_scaled_clip_vec

%P_mid2_top = OpFAdd %v4float %P_mid2_clip_base %perp_mid2_scaled_clip_vec
%P_mid2_bottom = OpFSub %v4float %P_mid2_clip_base %perp_mid2_scaled_clip_vec
%P2_top = OpFAdd %v4float %P2_clip_base %perp2_scaled_clip_vec
%P2_bottom = OpFSub %v4float %P2_clip_base %perp2_scaled_clip_vec

; Emit P_mid2_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P_mid2_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color_mid2
OpEmitVertex
; Emit P_mid2_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P_mid2_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color_mid2
OpEmitVertex
; Emit P2_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P2_top
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex
; Emit P2_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0 %P2_bottom
OpStore %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

 0.0000

Geometry Shader - Silhouette Edges (triangle_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (12579 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL 4.50
; Capabilities: Geometry, Shader
; Memory Model: Logical, GLSL450

OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor_out %ubo_data
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 15
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; GLSL.std.450 extension
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; All types and constants
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%v4int = OpTypeVector %int 4

%mat4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%ptr_v4float_Input = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_v3float_Input = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_v4float_Output = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_v3float_Output = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_v4float_Uniform = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%ptr_mat4v4float_Uniform = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4v4float
%ptr_v3float_Function = OpTypePointer Function %v3float

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6
%uint_15 = OpConstant %uint 15
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_015 = OpConstant %float 0.015
%float_neg_0_015 = OpConstant %float -0.015

; Vec3 constants
%v3float_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0
%v3float_1_1_1 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0

; gl_PerVertex (input)
%gl_PerVertex_in_struct = OpTypeStruct %v4float ; gl_Position
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_struct 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_struct Block
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in_struct %uint_6
%ptr_arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_arr_gl_PerVertex_in Input

; User-defined inputs
%arr_v3float_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_arr_v3float_Input = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_in
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_arr_v3float_Input Input
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_arr_v3float_Input Input
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_arr_v3float_Input Input

; gl_PerVertex (output)
%gl_PerVertex_out_struct = OpTypeStruct %v4float ; gl_Position
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_struct 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_struct Block
%ptr_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out_struct
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; User-defined outputs
%ptr_v3float_Output_single = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
OpDecorate %outColor_out Location 0
%outColor_out = OpVariable %ptr_v3float_Output_single Output

; UBO structure (set=0, binding=0)
%ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_struct 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo_struct Block
%ptr_ubo_struct = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_struct
OpDecorate %ubo_data DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_data Binding 0
%ubo_data = OpVariable %ptr_ubo_struct Uniform

; Function type for main
%fn_void_void = OpTypeFunction %void

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_void_void
%entry = OpLabel

; Load UBO members
%ptr_model_mat = OpAccessChain %ptr_mat4v4float_Uniform %ubo_data %int_0
%model_mat = OpLoad %mat4v4float %ptr_model_mat
%ptr_view_mat = OpAccessChain %ptr_mat4v4float_Uniform %ubo_data %int_1
%view_mat = OpLoad %mat4v4float %ptr_view_mat
%ptr_proj_mat = OpAccessChain %ptr_mat4v4float_Uniform %ubo_data %int_2
%proj_mat = OpLoad %mat4v4float %ptr_proj_mat
%ptr_lightPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Uniform %ubo_data %int_3
%lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_lightPos
%ptr_cameraPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Uniform %ubo_data %int_4
%cameraPos = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_cameraPos
%ptr_params = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Uniform %ubo_data %int_5
%params = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_params

; Load input vertex data for main triangle (indices 0, 2, 4)
; Vertex 0
%ptr_glpos_0_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Input %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%glpos_0_in = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_glpos_0_in
%ptr_worldpos_0_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %worldPos_in %int_0
%worldpos_0_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldpos_0_in
%ptr_normal_0_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %normal_in %int_0
%normal_0_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_normal_0_in
%ptr_color_0_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %color_in %int_0
%color_0_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_0_in

; Vertex 2
%ptr_glpos_2_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Input %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%glpos_2_in = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_glpos_2_in
%ptr_worldpos_2_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %worldPos_in %int_2
%worldpos_2_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldpos_2_in
%ptr_normal_2_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %normal_in %int_2
%normal_2_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_normal_2_in
%ptr_color_2_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %color_in %int_2
%color_2_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_2_in

; Vertex 4
%ptr_glpos_4_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Input %gl_in %int_4 %int_0
%glpos_4_in = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_glpos_4_in
%ptr_worldpos_4_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %worldPos_in %int_4
%worldpos_4_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldpos_4_in
%ptr_normal_4_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %normal_in %int_4
%normal_4_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_normal_4_in
%ptr_color_4_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %color_in %int_4
%color_4_in = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_4_in

; Start emitting the main triangle
; Dimmed color for original triangle
%dim_factor = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_3 %float_0_3

; Vertex 0 of main triangle
%dimmed_color_0 = OpFMul %v3float %color_0_in %dim_factor
OpStore %gl_out %glpos_0_in
OpStore %outColor_out %dimmed_color_0
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2 of main triangle
%dimmed_color_2 = OpFMul %v3float %color_2_in %dim_factor
OpStore %gl_out %glpos_2_in
OpStore %outColor_out %dimmed_color_2
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4 of main triangle
%dimmed_color_4 = OpFMul %v3float %color_4_in %dim_factor
OpStore %gl_out %glpos_4_in
OpStore %outColor_out %dimmed_color_4
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Now for the edges.
; Edge color is white
%white_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0

; The following will be for edge processing
; Edge 0: (v0, v2)
%camera_pos_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %cameraPos %cameraPos %int_0 %int_1 %int_2

; Edge 0-2 calculation
%edge_vec_0_2 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_2_in %worldpos_0_in
%normalized_edge_vec_0_2 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %edge_vec_0_2
%view_vec_0 = OpFSub %v3float %camera_pos_v3 %worldpos_0_in
%normalized_view_vec_0 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %view_vec_0
%cross_product_0_2 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Cross %normalized_edge_vec_0_2 %normalized_view_vec_0
%normalized_cross_0_2 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %cross_product_0_2
%offset_vec_0_2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %normalized_cross_0_2 %float_0_015

; Quad vertices for edge 0-2 (world space)
%q0_world_0_2 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_0_in %offset_vec_0_2
%q1_world_0_2 = OpFAdd %v3float %worldpos_0_in %offset_vec_0_2
%q2_world_0_2 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_2_in %offset_vec_0_2
%q3_world_0_2 = OpFAdd %v3float %worldpos_2_in %offset_vec_0_2

; Transform and emit quad for edge 0-2
%q0_world_0_2_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q0_world_0_2 %float_1_0
%q0_clip_0_2 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q0_world_0_2_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q0_clip_0_2
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q1_world_0_2_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q1_world_0_2 %float_1_0
%q1_clip_0_2 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q1_world_0_2_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q1_clip_0_2
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q2_world_0_2_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q2_world_0_2 %float_1_0
%q2_clip_0_2 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q2_world_0_2_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q2_clip_0_2
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q3_world_0_2_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q3_world_0_2 %float_1_0
%q3_clip_0_2 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q3_world_0_2_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q3_clip_0_2
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 1: (v2, v4)
%edge_vec_2_4 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_4_in %worldpos_2_in
%normalized_edge_vec_2_4 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %edge_vec_2_4
%view_vec_2 = OpFSub %v3float %camera_pos_v3 %worldpos_2_in
%normalized_view_vec_2 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %view_vec_2
%cross_product_2_4 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Cross %normalized_edge_vec_2_4 %normalized_view_vec_2
%normalized_cross_2_4 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %cross_product_2_4
%offset_vec_2_4 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %normalized_cross_2_4 %float_0_015

; Quad vertices for edge 2-4 (world space)
%q0_world_2_4 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_2_in %offset_vec_2_4
%q1_world_2_4 = OpFAdd %v3float %worldpos_2_in %offset_vec_2_4
%q2_world_2_4 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_4_in %offset_vec_2_4
%q3_world_2_4 = OpFAdd %v3float %worldpos_4_in %offset_vec_2_4

; Transform and emit quad for edge 2-4
%q0_world_2_4_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q0_world_2_4 %float_1_0
%q0_clip_2_4 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q0_world_2_4_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q0_clip_2_4
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q1_world_2_4_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q1_world_2_4 %float_1_0
%q1_clip_2_4 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q1_world_2_4_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q1_clip_2_4
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q2_world_2_4_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q2_world_2_4 %float_1_0
%q2_clip_2_4 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q2_world_2_4_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q2_clip_2_4
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q3_world_2_4_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q3_world_2_4 %float_1_0
%q3_clip_2_4 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q3_world_2_4_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q3_clip_2_4
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 2: (v4, v0)
%edge_vec_4_0 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_0_in %worldpos_4_in
%normalized_edge_vec_4_0 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %edge_vec_4_0
%view_vec_4 = OpFSub %v3float %camera_pos_v3 %worldpos_4_in
%normalized_view_vec_4 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %view_vec_4
%cross_product_4_0 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Cross %normalized_edge_vec_4_0 %normalized_view_vec_4
%normalized_cross_4_0 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %cross_product_4_0
%offset_vec_4_0 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %normalized_cross_4_0 %float_0_015

; Quad vertices for edge 4-0 (world space)
%q0_world_4_0 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_4_in %offset_vec_4_0
%q1_world_4_0 = OpFAdd %v3float %worldpos_4_in %offset_vec_4_0
%q2_world_4_0 = OpFSub %v3float %worldpos_0_in %offset_vec_4_0
%q3_world_4_0 = OpFAdd %v3float %worldpos_0_in %offset_vec_4_0

; Transform and emit quad for edge 4-0
%q0_world_4_0_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q0_world_4_0 %float_1_0
%q0_clip_4_0 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q0_world_4_0_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q0_clip_4_0
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q1_world_4_0_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q1_world_4_0 %float_1_0
%q1_clip_4_0 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q1_world_4_0_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q1_clip_4_0
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex

%q2_world_4_0_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q2_world_4_0 %float_1_0
%q2_clip_4_0 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q2_world_4_0_v4

%q3_world_4_0_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %q3_world_4_0 %float_1_0
%q3_clip_4_0 = OpMatrixTimesVector %v4float %proj_mat %q3_world_4_0_v4
OpStore %gl_out %q3_clip_4_0
OpStore %outColor_out %white_color
OpEmitVertex
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL; 14
; Capabilities:
;  Geometry
; Memory Model: Logical; GLSL450
;
; Task: Render wireframe: emit each edge of the triangle as a thin quad.
; Input primitive: InputTrianglesAdjacency (6 vertices per invocation, array size 6)
; Output primitive: OutputTriangleStrip
; Output vertices: 12 (3 edges × 4 verts)

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %_ %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor_out
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 12
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug Names
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %worldPos_in "worldPos_in"
OpName %normal_in "normal_in"
OpName %color_in "color_in"
OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
OpName %outColor_out "outColor_out"
OpName %gl_PerVertex "gl_PerVertex"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex 0 "gl_Position"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_in ArrayStride 32
OpDecorate %gl_in BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
OpDecorate %_ RuntimeArrayStride 16 ; Placeholder, assuming a standard gl_PerVertex structure
OpDecorate %_arr_gl_PerVertex_6 ArrayStride 32
OpDecorate %gl_out ArrayStride 16
OpDecorate %gl_out BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %outColor_out Location 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%_ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

%gl_PerVertex = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6
%_arr_gl_PerVertex_6 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex %uint_6
%_ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_gl_PerVertex_6
%_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex
%_ptr_gl_PerVertex_0 = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_gl_PerVertex_6

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_004 = OpConstant %float 0.004 ; 0.008 / 2.0

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2

; Global Variables
%gl_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex Input
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input

%gl_out = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex Output
%outColor_out = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v3float Output

%_ = OpTypeFunction %void ; Placeholder for the function type

%main = OpFunction %void None %_
%main_label = OpLabel

; Edge 0-2
%pos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos0 = OpLoad %v4float %pos0_ptr
%pos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%pos2 = OpLoad %v4float %pos2_ptr

%worldPos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos_in %int_0
%worldPos0 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos0_ptr
%worldPos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos_in %int_2
%worldPos2 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos2_ptr

%color0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color_in %int_0
%color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color0_ptr
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color_in %int_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr

; Calculate edge vector (worldPos_2D - worldPos_0_2D)
%worldPos0_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos0 %uint_0
%worldPos0_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos0 %uint_1
%worldPos2_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_0
%worldPos2_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_1

%edge_x = OpFSub %float %worldPos2_x %worldPos0_x
%edge_y = OpFSub %float %worldPos2_y %worldPos0_y
%edge_2d = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %edge_x %edge_y %float_0_0

; Calculate perpendicular vector (-edge_y, edge_x, 0.0)
%perp_x = OpFNegate %float %edge_y
%perp_2d = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp_x %edge_x %float_0_0

; Normalize perpendicular vector
%dot_perp = OpDot %float %perp_2d %perp_2d
%sqrt_dot_perp = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Sqrt %dot_perp
%norm_perp_2d = OpFDiv %v3float %perp_2d %sqrt_dot_perp

; Scale perpendicular vector
%scaled_perp_2d = OpFMul %v3float %norm_perp_2d %float_0_004

; Calculate average color
%avg_color_sum = OpFAdd %v3float %color0 %color2
%avg_color = OpFMul %v3float %avg_color_sum %float_0_5

; Emit quad vertices for edge 0-2
; Vertex 1: worldPos0 - scaled_perp_2d
%v1_pos_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos0 %uint_0
%v1_pos_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos0 %uint_1
%v1_pos_z = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos0 %uint_2
%scaled_perp_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %scaled_perp_2d %uint_0
%scaled_perp_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %scaled_perp_2d %uint_1
%v1_new_x = OpFSub %float %v1_pos_x %scaled_perp_x
%v1_new_y = OpFSub %float %v1_pos_y %scaled_perp_y
%pos0_w = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %pos0 %uint_3 ; Get w from original gl_Position
%v1_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v1_new_x %v1_new_y %v1_pos_z %pos0_w
%gl_out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v1_final_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %avg_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: worldPos0 + scaled_perp_2d
%v2_pos_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos0 %uint_0
%v2_pos_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos0 %uint_1
%v2_new_x = OpFAdd %float %v2_pos_x %scaled_perp_x
%v2_new_y = OpFAdd %float %v2_pos_y %scaled_perp_y
%v2_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v2_new_x %v2_new_y %v1_pos_z %pos0_w
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v2_final_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %avg_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: worldPos2 - scaled_perp_2d
%v3_pos_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_0
%v3_pos_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_1
%v3_pos_z = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_2
%v3_new_x = OpFSub %float %v3_pos_x %scaled_perp_x
%v3_new_y = OpFSub %float %v3_pos_y %scaled_perp_y
%pos2_w = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %pos2 %uint_3
%v3_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v3_new_x %v3_new_y %v3_pos_z %pos2_w
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v3_final_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %avg_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4: worldPos2 + scaled_perp_2d
%v4_pos_x = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_0
%v4_pos_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_1

%v4_new_y = OpFAdd %float %v4_pos_y %scaled_perp_y
%v4_final_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v4_new_x %v4_new_y %v3_pos_z %pos2_w
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v4_final_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %avg_color
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 2-4
%pos4_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_4 %int_0
%pos4 = OpLoad %v4float %pos4_ptr

%worldPos4_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos_in %int_4

%color4_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color_in %int_4

; Calculate edge vector (worldPos_4_2D - worldPos_2_2D)
%worldPos2_x_e2 = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_0
%worldPos2_y_e2 = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos2 %uint_1
%worldPos4_x_e2 = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos4 %uint_0
%worldPos4_y_e2 = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %worldPos4 %uint_1

; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 10
; Capabilities: Shader
; Extensions: SPV_KHR_shader_ballot
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %_ %gl_PerVertex_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_PerVertex_out %outColor %_uniform_41_type %_uniform_41_data

OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_in "gl_PerVertex_in"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_in 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_out "gl_PerVertex_out"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_out 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %_uniform_41_type "UBO"

OpMemberName %_uniform_41_type 2 "proj"

%void = OpTypeVoid

%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1

%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3

%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_2_0 = OpConstant %float 2.0
%float_3_0 = OpConstant %float 3.0

%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6

%_arr_v4float_uint_6 = OpTypeArray %v4float %uint_6
%_arr_v3float_uint_6 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6

; gl_PerVertex Input
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%_arr_gl_PerVertex_in_uint_6 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6
%_ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_gl_PerVertex_in_uint_6

; User-defined Inputs
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_v3float_uint_6
%_ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_v4float_uint_6

%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0

%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
OpDecorate %normal Location 1

%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
OpDecorate %color Location 2

; gl_PerVertex Output
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_PerVertex_out_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; User-defined Output
%_ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - same layout as test 41
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%_arr_v4float_uint_1 = OpTypeArray %v4float %uint_1
%_arr_float_uint_4 = OpTypeArray %float %uint_4
%_arr_int_uint_4 = OpTypeArray %int %uint_4
%_arr_uint_uint_4 = OpTypeArray %uint %uint_4

%_uniform_41_type = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %_uniform_41_type 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %_uniform_41_type Block
%_ptr_Uniform__uniform_41_type = OpTypePointer Uniform %_uniform_41_type
%_uniform_41_data = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform__uniform_41_type Uniform
OpDecorate %_uniform_41_data DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_uniform_41_data Binding 0

; Pointers to array elements
%_ptr_Input_v4float_array_element = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float_array_element = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in_element = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

%main = OpFunction %void None %void
%_ = OpLabel

; Load worldPos for vertices 0, 2, 4
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float_array_element %worldPos %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v3float %p0_ptr
%p2_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float_array_element %worldPos %int_2
%p2 = OpLoad %v3float %p2_ptr
%p4_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float_array_element %worldPos %int_4
%p4 = OpLoad %v3float %p4_ptr

; Compute p2 - p0
%p2_minus_p0 = OpFSub %v3float %p2 %p0
; Compute p4 - p0
%p4_minus_p0 = OpFSub %v3float %p4 %p0

; Compute face normal N = cross(p2-p0, p4-p0)
; cross(a, b) = (a.y*b.z-a.z*b.y, a.z*b.x-a.x*b.z, a.x*b.y-a.y*b.x)
%aybz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2_minus_p0 %p4_minus_p0 4 8 13 ; a.y, b.z
%azby = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2_minus_p0 %p4_minus_p0 5 7 14 ; a.z, b.y
%N_x = OpFSub %float %aybz %azby

%azbx = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2_minus_p0 %p4_minus_p0 5 6 15 ; a.z, b.x
%axbz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2_minus_p0 %p4_minus_p0 3 8 16 ; a.x, b.z
%N_y = OpFSub %float %azbx %axbz

%axby = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2_minus_p0 %p4_minus_p0 3 7 17 ; a.x, b.y
%aybx = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2_minus_p0 %p4_minus_p0 4 6 18 ; a.y, b.x
%N_z = OpFSub %float %axby %aybx

%N = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %N_x %N_y %N_z

; Normalize face normal N
%N_normalized = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %N

; Light direction L = normalize(vec3(1, 1, 1))
%L = OpVectorConstruct %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0
%L_normalized = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %L

; Diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0)
%N_dot_L = OpDot %float %N_normalized %L_normalized
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %1 FMax %N_dot_L %float_0_0

; Base color = average of color[0], color[2], color[4]
%color0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float_array_element %color %int_0
%color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color0_ptr
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float_array_element %color %int_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr
%color4_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float_array_element %color %int_4
%color4 = OpLoad %v3float %color4_ptr

%color_sum = OpFAdd %v3float %color0 %color2
%color_sum = OpFAdd %v3float %color_sum %color4
%base_color = OpFDiv %v3float %color_sum %float_3_0

; Final color = base * (0.2 + 0.8 * diffuse)
%factor_0_8_diffuse = OpFMul %float %float_0_8 %diffuse
%factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_2 %factor_0_8_diffuse
%final_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %base_color %factor

; Emit vertices
%output_position_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_PerVertex_out_var %int_0
%output_color_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v3float %outColor

; Emit vertex 0
%in_gl_pos_0_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float_array_element %gl_PerVertex_in_var %int_0 %int_0
%in_gl_pos_0 = OpLoad %v4float %in_gl_pos_0_ptr
OpStore %output_position_ptr %in_gl_pos_0
OpStore %output_color_ptr %final_color
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 1
%in_gl_pos_2_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float_array_element %gl_PerVertex_in_var %int_2 %int_0
%in_gl_pos_2 = OpLoad %v4float %in_gl_pos_2_ptr
OpStore %output_position_ptr %in_gl_pos_2
OpStore %output_color_ptr %final_color
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 2
%in_gl_pos_4_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float_array_element %gl_PerVertex_in_var %int_4 %int_0
%in_gl_pos_4 = OpLoad %v4float %in_gl_pos_4_ptr
OpStore %output_position_ptr %in_gl_pos_4
OpStore %output_color_ptr %final_color
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Test 43: Fragment Shaders (HLSL) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing an HLSL pixel (fragment) shader for Vulkan. The shader will be
compiled with glslangValidator (-D flag for HLSL mode) targeting Vulkan 1.0,
then rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader, using Vulkan layout attributes):**
```hlsl
struct PSInput {
[[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0; // world-space position
[[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal : TEXCOORD1; // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
[[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv : TEXCOORD2; // texture coordinates in [0,1]
[[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent : TEXCOORD3; // tangent vector
[[vk::location(4)]] float3 color : TEXCOORD4; // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};
```

**Available constant buffer (set 0, binding 0):**
```hlsl
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
float4x4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
float4x4 view; // offset 64
float4x4 projection; // offset 128
float4 lightPos; // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
float4 cameraPos; // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
float4 params; // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```hlsl
float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
```

**HLSL requirements:**
- Use Vulkan-specific attributes: `[[vk::location(N)]]` for inputs, `[[vk::binding(B, S)]]` for UBO
- Entry point must be named `main`
- Return type is `float4` with `SV_Target0` semantic
- Standard HLSL intrinsics are available: normalize, dot, reflect, pow, max, clamp, lerp, etc.
- Use `mul()` for matrix-vector operations if needed

**Write ONLY the complete HLSL source code.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the shader source.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (float4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

The code is compiled to SPIR-V behind the scenes and rendered; the output is compared pixel-by-pixel against the reference images.

HLSL Shader - Normal to RGB

View HLSL (854 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

struct UBO {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO_binding : register(b0) {
    UBO ubo;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the normal vector as it may be interpolated
    float3 normalizedNormal = normalize(input.normal);

    // Map the normal from [-1, 1] to [0, 1] for color visualization
    float3 color = normalizedNormal * 0.5 + 0.5;

    // Output the color with alpha 1.0
    return float4(color, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Lambertian Diffuse

View HLSL (975 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate the light direction vector
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate the Lambertian diffuse intensity
    // Max with 0 to ensure no negative lighting
    float diffuse_intensity = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Output grayscale intensity with alpha 1.0
    return float4(diffuse_intensity, diffuse_intensity, diffuse_intensity, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Phong Specular

View HLSL (1230 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate light vector L
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate view vector V
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate reflection vector R
    // R = reflect(-L, N)
    float3 R = reflect(-L, N);

    // Calculate diffuse component
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Calculate specular component
    float specular = pow(max(dot(R, V), 0.0), 32.0);

    // Calculate grayscale intensity
    float intensity = 0.2 + 0.5 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;

    // Output grayscale color with alpha 1.0
    return float4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Blinn-Phong

View HLSL (1645 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate vector from fragment to light source
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate vector from fragment to camera position
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate the half-vector
    float3 H = normalize(L + V);

    // Calculate diffuse component
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Calculate specular component
    float specular = pow(max(dot(N, H), 0.0), 64.0);

    // Calculate grayscale intensity
    float intensity = 0.1 + 0.6 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;

    // Output final color with alpha 1.0
    return float4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Rim Lighting

View HLSL (1730 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate view vector V
    float3 V = normalize(UBO.cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate light vector L
    float3 L = normalize(UBO.lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate diffuse component
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Calculate rim (Fresnel) lighting
    float rim = pow(1.0 - max(dot(N, V), 0.0), 3.0);

    // Base color modulated by diffuse
    float3 base_color = float3(0.2, 0.3, 0.8);
    float3 modulated_base_color = base_color * (0.3 + 0.5 * diffuse);

    // Rim tint
    float3 rim_tint = float3(1.0, 0.8, 0.5);
    float3 applied_rim_tint = rim_tint * rim;

    // Final color
    float3 final_rgb = modulated_base_color + applied_rim_tint;

    return float4(final_rgb, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Checkerboard

View HLSL (1439 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate checkerboard pattern
    float2 uv_scaled = input.uv * 8.0;
    float2 uv_floor = floor(uv_scaled);
    float checker_pattern = fmod(uv_floor.x + uv_floor.y, 2.0); // 0.0 or 1.0

    float base_color_value;
    if (checker_pattern < 0.5) { // Effectively checker_pattern == 0.0
        base_color_value = 0.9;
    } else { // Effectively checker_pattern == 1.0
        base_color_value = 0.2;
    }
    float3 base_color = float3(base_color_value, base_color_value, base_color_value);

    // Lambertian shading
    float3 L_dir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(0.0, dot(N, L_dir));
    float lambertian_factor = 0.5 + 0.5 * diffuse;

    // Combine checkerboard color and Lambertian shading
    float3 final_color_rgb = base_color * lambertian_factor;

    return float4(final_color_rgb, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Horizontal Stripes

View HLSL (1700 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Calculate stripe factor
    float stripeFactor = sin(input.uv.y * 3.14159 * 16.0);

    // Interpolate between red and blue based on stripeFactor
    float3 red = float3(0.9, 0.1, 0.1);
    float3 blue = float3(0.1, 0.1, 0.9);
    float3 stripeColor = lerp(red, blue, smoothstep(-0.5, 0.5, stripeFactor));

    // Normalize interpolated normal
    float3 normalizedNormal = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate light direction
    float3 lightDir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate diffuse component
    float diffuse = max(0.0, dot(normalizedNormal, lightDir));

    // Apply Lambertian shading
    float lightingFactor = 0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse;

    // Final color
    float3 finalColor = stripeColor * lightingFactor;

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Polka Dots

View HLSL (1206 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Polka Dot Pattern
    float2 uv_scaled = input.uv * 6.0;
    float2 cell_center = floor(uv_scaled) + 0.5;
    float dist_to_center = distance(uv_scaled, cell_center);

    float3 dot_color = float3(1.0, 0.8, 0.0);       // Yellow
    float3 background_color = float3(0.1, 0.1, 0.3); // Dark blue

    float3 base_color = (dist_to_center < 0.3) ? dot_color : background_color;

    // Lambertian Shading
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float diffuse = max(0.0, dot(N, L));
    float lambertian_factor = 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse;

    float3 final_color = base_color * lambertian_factor;

    return float4(final_color, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Hemisphere Lighting

View HLSL (982 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 normalizedNormal = normalize(input.normal);

    // Hemisphere ambient lighting
    float3 skyColor = float3(0.4, 0.6, 1.0);
    float3 groundColor = float3(0.3, 0.15, 0.05);

    float blendFactor = normalizedNormal.y * 0.5 + 0.5;
    float3 ambientColor = lerp(groundColor, skyColor, blendFactor);

    // Small diffuse term
    float3 diffuseTerm = 0.3 * input.color;

    float3 finalColor = ambientColor + diffuseTerm;

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Y-Gradient

View HLSL (911 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Task: Color based on world-space Y: t=clamp(worldPos.y * 0.5 + 0.5),
    // lerp bottom (0.1, 0.4, 0.1) to top (1.0, 1.0, 1.0), output alpha 1.0.

    float t = clamp(input.worldPos.y * 0.5 + 0.5, 0.0, 1.0);
    float3 bottomColor = float3(0.1, 0.4, 0.1);
    float3 topColor = float3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0);
    float3 finalColor = lerp(bottomColor, topColor, t);

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Fog Effect

View HLSL (1400 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 normalizedNormal = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate light vector
    float3 lightVec = lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos;
    float3 normalizedLightVec = normalize(lightVec);

    // Calculate diffuse factor (Lambertian)
    float diffuse = max(0.0, dot(normalizedNormal, normalizedLightVec));
    float lambertianFactor = 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse;

    // Base color
    float3 baseColor = float3(0.8, 0.2, 0.2) * lambertianFactor;

    // Calculate distance from camera to worldPos
    float dist = length(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate fog factor
    float fogFactor = clamp((dist - 1.5) / 3.0, 0.0, 1.0);

    // Fog color
    float3 fogColor = float3(0.7, 0.7, 0.8);

    // Lerp between base color and fog color
    float3 finalColor = lerp(baseColor, fogColor, fogFactor);

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Gooch Shading

View HLSL (1127 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate light vector and normalize it
    float3 L = normalize(UBO.lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate 't' value for Gooch shading
    // t = dot(N,L) * 0.5 + 0.5
    float t = dot(N, L) * 0.5 + 0.5;

    // Define warm and cool colors
    float3 coolColor = float3(0.2, 0.2, 0.75);
    float3 warmColor = float3(0.7, 0.7, 0.4);

    // Interpolate between warm and cool colors based on 't'
    float3 finalColor = lerp(coolColor, warmColor, t);

    // Output with alpha 1.0
    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Mandelbrot Set

Approach: Available inputs (from vertex shader, using Vulkan layout attributes):

View HLSL (1958 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

// Available constant buffer (set 0, binding 0):
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Mandelbrot set rendering
    float2 c;
    c.x = input.uv.x * 3.0 - 2.0; // Map uv.x from [0,1] to [-2,1]
    c.y = input.uv.y * 2.0 - 1.0; // Map uv.y from [0,1] to [-1,1]

    float2 z = float2(0.0, 0.0);
    int iterations = 0;
    const int maxIterations = 20;

    for (int i = 0; i < maxIterations; ++i) {
        // z = z*z + c
        float z_real_sq = z.x * z.x;
        float z_imag_sq = z.y * z.y;

        if ((z_real_sq + z_imag_sq) > 4.0) { // Escape condition |z|^2 > 4
            break;
        }

        z = float2(z_real_sq - z_imag_sq + c.x, 2.0 * z.x * z.y + c.y);
        iterations++;
    }

    float t = saturate((float)iterations / (float)maxIterations);

    float4 finalColor;
    if (iterations == maxIterations) { // Point is inside the Mandelbrot set
        finalColor = float4(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0); // Black for inside
    } else { // Point is outside, color based on iterations
        finalColor = float4(t, t * 0.5, 1.0 - t, 1.0);
    }

    return finalColor;
}

HLSL Shader - Brick Pattern

View HLSL (2435 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // 1. Brick pattern parameters
    float2 brickScale = float2(8.0, 16.0);
    float2 mortarThickness = float2(0.05, 0.1); // x and y thickness
    float4 mortarColor = float4(0.7, 0.7, 0.7, 1.0);
    float4 brickColor = float4(0.7, 0.2, 0.1, 1.0);

    // 2. Scaled UV coordinates
    float2 scaledUV = input.uv * brickScale;

    // 3. Staggered row effect
    float row = floor(scaledUV.y);
    if (fmod(row, 2.0) < 1.0) { // Even rows
        // No offset
    } else { // Odd rows
        scaledUV.x += 0.5; // Half-brick offset
    }

    // 4. Calculate brick and mortar regions
    float2 brickUV = fmod(scaledUV, 1.0); // Fractional part within each brick unit

    // Adjust mortar thickness to be symmetrical around the edges
    // If brickUV.x < mortarThickness.x OR brickUV.x > (1.0 - mortarThickness.x), then it's mortar.
    // The same for Y.
    bool isMortarX = (brickUV.x < mortarThickness.x || brickUV.x > (1.0 - mortarThickness.x));
    bool isMortarY = (brickUV.y < mortarThickness.y || brickUV.y > (1.0 - mortarThickness.y));
    
    bool isMortar = (isMortarX || isMortarY);

    float4 finalColor = isMortar ? mortarColor : brickColor;

    // 5. Lambertian shading
    float3 worldNormal = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 lightDir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float diffuse = max(0.0, dot(worldNormal, lightDir));
    float lambertianFactor = 0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse;

    finalColor.rgb *= lambertianFactor;
    finalColor.a = 1.0; // Ensure alpha is 1.0

    return finalColor;
}

HLSL Shader - Fresnel Heatmap

View HLSL (926 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float NdotV = max(dot(N, V), 0.0);

    float r, g, b;

    if (NdotV < 0.5) {
        r = 1.0;
        g = 2.0 * NdotV;
        b = 0.0;
    } else {
        r = 1.0 - (NdotV - 0.5) * 2.0;
        g = r; // g is the same as r in this case
        b = (NdotV - 0.5) * 2.0;
    }

    return float4(r, g, b, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Full Phong Model

View HLSL (1387 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Calculate light direction
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Calculate view direction
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Ambient component
    float3 ambientColor = float3(0.1, 0.05, 0.05);
    float3 ambient = ambientColor;

    // Diffuse component
    float diff = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float3 diffuse = input.color * diff;

    // Specular component
    float3 specularColor = float3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0);
    float shininess = 32.0;
    float3 R = reflect(-L, N);
    float spec = pow(max(dot(R, V), 0.0), shininess);
    float3 specular = specularColor * spec;

    // Final color
    float3 finalColor = ambient + diffuse + specular;

    // Clamp and output with alpha 1.0
    return float4(clamp(finalColor, 0.0, 1.0), 1.0);
}

Test 44: Fragment Shaders (GLSL) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a GLSL fragment shader for Vulkan (GLSL 450). The shader will be
compiled with glslangValidator targeting Vulkan 1.0, then rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader):**
```glsl
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos; // world-space position
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal; // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv; // texture coordinates in [0,1]
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent; // tangent vector
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color; // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
```

**Available uniform buffer (set 0, binding 0):**
```glsl
layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
mat4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
mat4 view; // offset 64
mat4 projection; // offset 128
vec4 lightPos; // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
vec4 cameraPos; // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
vec4 params; // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
} ubo;
```

**Required output:**
```glsl
layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor; // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
```

**GLSL requirements:**
- Must start with `#version 450`
- Use `layout(location = N)` for inputs/outputs
- Use `layout(set = 0, binding = 0)` for the UBO
- Standard GLSL built-ins available: normalize, dot, reflect, pow, max, clamp, mix, etc.
- Entry point must be `void main()`

**Write ONLY the complete GLSL source code.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the shader source.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (vec4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

The code is compiled to SPIR-V and rendered; the output is compared pixel-by-pixel against the reference images.

layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos;   // world-space position
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal;     // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv;         // texture coordinates in [0,1]
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent;    // tangent vector
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color;      // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)

layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
    mat4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    mat4 view;           // offset 64

GLSL Shader - Phong Specular

Approach: version 450

View GLSL (979 chars)
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos;
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal;
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv;
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent;
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color;

layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
    mat4 model;
    mat4 view;
    mat4 projection;
    vec4 lightPos;
    vec4 cameraPos;
    vec4 params;
} ubo;

layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;

void main() {
    // Normalize vectors
    vec3 N = normalize(normal);
    vec3 L = normalize(ubo.lightPos.xyz - worldPos);
    vec3 V = normalize(ubo.cameraPos.xyz - worldPos);

    // Calculate reflection vector
    vec3 R = reflect(-L, N);

    // Calculate diffuse component
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Calculate specular component
    float specular = pow(max(dot(R, V), 0.0), 32.0);

    // Calculate grayscale intensity
    float intensity = 0.2 + 0.5 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;

    // Output final color
    outColor = vec4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

GLSL Shader - Blinn-Phong

Approach: version 450

View GLSL (1530 chars)
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos;   // world-space position
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal;     // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv;         // texture coordinates in [0,1]
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent;    // tangent vector
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color;      // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)

layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
    mat4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    mat4 view;           // offset 64
    mat4 projection;     // offset 128
    vec4 lightPos;       // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    vec4 cameraPos;      // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    vec4 params;         // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
} ubo;

layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;  // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm

void main() {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    vec3 N = normalize(normal);

    // Calculate Light Vector (L)
    vec3 L = normalize(ubo.lightPos.xyz - worldPos);

    // Calculate View Vector (V)
    vec3 V = normalize(ubo.cameraPos.xyz - worldPos);

    // Calculate Half-vector (H)
    vec3 H = normalize(L + V);

    // Calculate Diffuse component
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Calculate Specular component
    float specular = pow(max(dot(N, H), 0.0), 64.0);

    // Calculate final grayscale intensity and set output color
    float intensity = 0.1 + 0.6 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;
    outColor = vec4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0); // Grayscale with alpha 1.0
}
